title: Sentinel Power User - 3 Screens required
description:
We are migrating safety-critical worker profiles from the UK Rail Sentinel database to our private management system. This role requires extreme speed, multitasking, and absolute precision. We are looking for "Power Users" who maintain a high-efficiency workstation.



Hardware Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



 * Triple Screen Setup:* You must have at least three monitors (e.g., Laptop + 2 Monitors or a 3-Desktop Monitor setup). This is essential for managing the source database, destination system, and communication tools simultaneously.

 *High-Speed Internet:* Minimum 25 Mbps with a stable backup connection.

*Compensation (Output-Based):*

We pay for results and efficiency. Top performers in this role earn significantly above the local hourly average.

  *$0.40 USD* per Initial Profile Migration (Est. 5 mins).

 *$0.10 USD* per Monthly Maintenance Update (Est. 1 min).

 *Weekly Payouts* processed via Wise.



*Quality Control & Accuracy Policy:*

Because this data involves rail safety, there is zero room for error.



 * Accuracy Penalty:* To ensure high standards, a deduction of *$0.80* (2x the initial entry rate) will be applied for every inaccurate profile (e.g., wrong date, typo in name, or missed competency).



 *Training:* We provide a brief paid trial/training period where these penalties are waived while you learn the system.



*Requirements:*

 * Native or near-native English proficiency.

 * Proven experience in high-volume data migration/entry.

 * Exceptional multitasking skills (managing multiple databases across screens).

 * High reliability for ongoing, daily work.



### Why work with us?

We value high-performing professionals and provide steady, long-term work with fast weekly payouts. If you have the hardware and the speed, this is a highly lucrative position.

title: Senior WordPress Developer – Remote
description:
Senior WordPress Developer – Remote



We're a digital agency handling a range of client projects — from custom-built WordPress themes to complex plugin work and WooCommerce stores. We're looking for a senior developer who genuinely understands WordPress at a deep level, not just someone who assembles pages with a builder and calls it development.



If you can architect a theme from scratch, write a plugin without leaning on tutorials, and still know your way around Elementor when a client needs it — this role was written for you.



What you'll be working on:



    Building custom WordPress themes from scratch (no starter-theme dependency required, but sensible use of one is fine)

    Developing and customizing plugins — hooks, filters, REST API, CPTs, meta boxes, the works

    WooCommerce customization — custom checkout flows, payment gateway integration, order management tweaks, custom product types

    Page builder work with Elementor when projects call for it (custom widgets, dynamic data, theme builder)

    Making architecture decisions independently and flagging tradeoffs to the team

    Code reviews, performance audits, and keeping things maintainable long-term



What we're looking for:



    4+ years of hands-on WordPress development — not just usage

    Strong PHP fundamentals; WordPress is the context, not the crutch

    Proven experience with custom theme development (we'll ask to see real work)

    Solid WooCommerce knowledge beyond the basics

    Comfortable with the full stack: HTML/CSS, JavaScript (vanilla or jQuery), Git

    Familiarity with ACF, REST API, and multisite setups is a plus

    Self-directed — you don't need someone to break down every task for you



Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph.







Your application should include:



    Your resume (PDF preferred)

    A Loom video — walk us through a WordPress project you're proud of. Show the site, the code, or both. Talk through the decisions you made — theme structure, plugin approach, WooCommerce setup, whatever's relevant. Under 5 minutes is plenty.

    Any personality or skills assessment results you have (DISC, 16Personalities, Enneagram, or similar)



Before you hit send — please read this:



Write your application the way you'd talk to a colleague. No AI-generated cover letters, no corporate-sounding introductions, no buzzword soup. I'm not grading your English — I'm trying to get a sense of who you actually are and how you think. A real, honest
 from a real developer will always stand out more than a perfectly formatted one that says nothing.

title: Full Stack Dev + Cyber Security
description:
About the role

We're seeking a full-stack developer who can take incomplete web projects across the finish line. You'll work with modern React frontends (Vite), connect them to our catalog of backend/data services, and handle deployments and optimization. Think less greenfield, more "get this shipped."



What you'll do

-Take partially built web apps from "almost there" to production-ready

-Build UI components, interactions, animations, and accessible patterns using our existing stack

-Connect frontends to backend/data layers (Drizzle ORM schemas, validation, available services)

-Implement forms, validation, client-side state, and data fetching following best practices

-Debug build/runtime issues, performance problems, and cross-browser/mobile quirks

-Set up CI/CD and deployments (Vercel, Supabase, Cloudflare, GitHub Actions)

-Write clear docs, deployment runbooks, and handoffs

-Work with the owner to scope work and estimate timelines



Must-haves

React & tooling

Solid React fundamentals (hooks, modern 18+/19 patterns, concurrent rendering)

Experience with Vite (plugins, config, bundling, deployment)

Tailwind CSS and component-driven UI

UI & interactions

Component libraries and accessible primitives (Radix-style)

Form handling + validation: React Hook Form + Zod

Data fetching/caching: TanStack Query

Animation: Framer Motion (or equivalent)

Routing: lightweight options like wouter

Deployment & infrastructure

Deploying to Vercel, integrating with Supabase/Cloudflare

Debugging build tooling, browser errors, dev environments



Soft skills

Clear communication, realistic estimation, delivery focus

GitHub (source control, PR reviews, CI/CD workflows)



Nice-to-have

Drizzle ORM or other TypeScript-first ORMs

Expo / React Native (React 19.1.0 compatibility)

Experience with any of: Lucide icons, Recharts, date-fns, embla-carousel, cmdk, sonner, vaul, react-day-picker, input-otp, react-resizable-panels

Replit Vite plugins (cartographer, dev-banner, runtime-error-modal)

Wiring frontends to Supabase or similar BaaS

Zod-first validation on client and server



Tech stack

Frontend

React 19 + Vite 7, Tailwind CSS v4, Radix-based shadcn-style UI, Lucide icons, Framer Motion, React Hook Form + Zod, TanStack Query, wouter, Recharts, date-fns, plus cmdk, sonner, vaul, embla-carousel, react-day-picker, input-otp, react-resizable-panels. Replit Vite plugins available in dev.



Backend/Data (catalog-ready)

Drizzle ORM, Zod schemas, Supabase



Platforms

Vercel, Supabase, Cloudflare, GitHub (Actions + integrations)



What success looks like

Half-built sites become fully deployed, tested, and documented with reliable CI/CD

Smooth data integration to catalog backends or provisioned databases

Few runtime errors, solid performance, accessible UI

Predictable delivery, clear updates on scope and status



How to apply

Send a brief summary of relevant projects (links preferred), your role on them, and availability. Include one or two short notes about a deployment or debugging challenge you solved recently.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant (STR Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Operations Virtual Assistant to join our team of five based in the UK. This role is strictly behind-the-scenes, focusing on the technical "heavy lifting" of onboarding new holiday homes and ensuring our data remains pristine across our tech stack. The ideal candidate is a Hostaway power-user who can navigate the nuances of OTA channel distribution with their eyes closed.

Key Responsibilities



1. Property Onboarding & Distribution

Hostaway Management: Take properties from "Contract Signed" to "Live." This includes building listings, configuring listing details, and setting up automation rules.

Channel Mapping: Seamlessly map new listings to Airbnb, Booking.com, and other OTA channels, ensuring content parity and synchronised calendars.

Content Loading: Upload high-res imagery, descriptions, and amenities with 100?curacy.



2. Systems & Data Management

Task Tracking: Update and move tasks through our onboarding pipeline in Asana.

Ticket Support: Manage internal documentation and data updates within Zendesk.

Data Entry: Maintain master spreadsheets and operational documents within the Microsoft Suite (Excel/SharePoint).



Technical Requirements

Hostaway: Experience with listing creation, mapping, and engine settings.

OTAs: Deep understanding of Airbnb and Booking.com back-office environments.

Asana Intermediate: Able to manage workflows and sub-tasks independently.

Microsoft Suite High: Advanced Excel skills (formatting, basic formulas) and OneDrive/Teams.

Zendesk Intermediate: Experience managing internal tickets or data logs.



About You

Process-Driven: You love a checklist and find satisfaction in moving a project from 0% to 100%.

STR Savvy: You understand the "why" behind the data (e.g., why a cleaning fee needs to sync correctly or how a cancellation policy affects ranking).

Team Player: You enjoy working in a small, agile team of five where your output directly impacts the speed of our growth.

Invisible Expert: You prefer a "heads-down" role. You are not required to speak with guests or property owners



Training & Resources

We will induct you into the business as part of your first week with the business. This will allow you to get a feel for our team, business and the processes we use.



Note: This is a remote, non-customer-facing position. Fluency in English (written) is essential for data accuracy and internal communication.

title: General Virtual Assistant (Web, Admin, Client Support & Growth)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support multiple areas of our business, including website management, document organization,
 communication, and client success operations. This role is ideal for someone who is proactive, tech-savvy, and comfortable working across different tasks that contribute to business growth and daily operations.



Key Responsibilities



Website Support

Maintain and update company websites, landing pages, and content as needed. Ensure all pages are functional, accurate, and aligned with current offers and services.



Document Management

Create, organize, and update business documents including SOPs, training materials, presentations, and internal files. Keep systems structured and easy to navigate.



Collaboration Portal Completion

Assist in building and finalizing a collaboration portal for internal and external use. This includes organizing workflows, uploading content, and ensuring usability for team members and partners.




 Management

Handle inbox organization, respond to inquiries, send outreach
s, and follow up with leads or clients. Maintain professional and timely communication at all times.



Client Success & Growth Support

Work alongside Client Success Managers (CSMs) to help improve customer experience, manage client communications, and support strategies that drive engagement and retention. Assist in initiatives that help increase traffic, leads, and overall business growth.



Requirements

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Experience with website platforms (such as WordPress, Wix, or similar)

Familiarity with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Proactive mindset and problem-solving skills

Experience supporting customer service or client success is a plus



Preferred but Not Required

Experience with CRM systems

Basic understanding of marketing or lead generation

Familiarity with project management tools (Trello, Asana, ClickUp, etc.)



Work Setup

Remote position

Flexible hours, but must be responsive and reliable

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short message explaining your experience with websites,
 management, and client support. Include any relevant portfolio or examples of past work if available.



We are looking for someone who can grow with the company and take ownership of their role while supporting multiple moving parts of the business.

title: Virtual Assistant — Marketplace & Directory Listings (Long-term, Part-time to Full-time)
description:
We need help creating and submitting listings for our products across multiple marketplaces and directories. This is a structured, detail-oriented role with clear templates and brand guidelines. Examples of work include:

Software directory submissions (G2, Capterra, AlternativeTo, GetApp, SaaSworthy, Product Hunt)

App store metadata, screenshots, and category selection

Reviewing submissions for accuracy against templates

You will not be writing original marketing copy. We provide source content. Your job is to adapt it correctly to each platform's format, character limits, and category structure.

Requirements



Strong written English. We will check this in the application response.

Detail-oriented. Listings get rejected for small format errors and we do not want to redo work.

Comfortable with spreadsheets, basic image editing (Canva or similar), and following a template.

Reliable. Consistent hours and clear communication on progress.

Available at least 20 hours per week, with potential to grow into full-time.

Long-term mindset. We are not looking for a one-week gig.



Nice to Have



Prior experience with B2B SaaS listings or app marketplace submissions

Familiarity with at least one of: G2, Capterra, Microsoft AppSource, Product Hunt

Light Photoshop or Canva skills for resizing and adapting marketing images

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
Social Media Specialist — Instagram & TikTok



Instagram

TikTok

Full-time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a talented and results-driven Social Media Specialist to take full ownership of the brand account across Instagram and TikTok building a genuine community, and producing content that performs.



If you live and breathe short-form video, understand what makes content go viral, and know how to turn viewers into loyal followers, we want to hear from you.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Own and manage the brand's Instagram and TikTok accounts end-to-end

Develop and execute a monthly content calendar tailored to each platform's format and audience behavior

Create high-quality content including Reels, TikTok videos, Stories, carousels, and static posts  from concept to publish

Write compelling captions, hooks, and calls-to-action optimized for each platform

Grow followers organically through consistent posting, trend-jacking, hashtag strategy, and engagement tactics

Actively engage with the community, respond to comments and DMs, interact with followers, and build relationships

Monitor performance metrics (reach, engagement rate, follower growth, saves, shares, video watch time) and adjust strategy accordingly

Stay on top of Instagram and TikTok algorithm updates, trending sounds, formats, and content styles

Research competitors and identify content opportunities and gaps

Deliver weekly or monthly performance reports with insights and recommendations



REQUIREMENTS

2+ years of proven experience managing and growing Instagram and/or TikTok accounts

Portfolio or case studies showing tangible follower growth and engagement results

Strong short-form video creation and editing skills (CapCut, InShot, Adobe Premiere, or similar)

Good eye for aesthetics — on-screen text, transitions, pacing, thumbnails, and feed look

Solid understanding of Instagram and TikTok algorithms, content formats, and trending mechanics

Strong copywriting skills — punchy hooks, engaging captions, effective CTAs

Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

Highly organized — able to plan content in advance and meet deadlines consistently



NICE TO HAVE

Experience with Instagram and TikTok paid ads / boosting

On-camera confidence for talking-head or UGC-style content

Basic graphic design skills (Canva or Adobe)

Familiarity with social media analytics tools (Meta Business Suite, TikTok Analytics)



WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive salary commensurate with experience

Collaborative team that moves fast and values results

Clear goals and room to grow with the brand

title: VA: Admin, Tech, Lead Gen, Podcast editing with EXCELLENT English (experience working with coaches required)
description:
Virtual Assistant

Tech, Admin, Client Experience, Community & Social Media Support

Part-Time | 5–15 hours/week (average 10 hours)



Hey there ???? We’re looking for a proactive, experienced Virtual Assistant to support our growing business with social media, lead generation, community engagement, and admin support. You’ll be joining a small, purpose-driven team (just 2 of us right now) and playing an important role in helping the business run smoothly behind the scenes. From scheduling content and engaging with our audience to supporting launches and keeping our systems updated, you’ll help create more ease, consistency, and 
ntum in the business.



This role is ideal for someone who loves bringing structure to moving parts, enjoys online community-building, and feels excited about supporting a business that helps entrepreneurs step into high-end leadership and aligned success.

If you’ve supported coaches before, love clear instructions and SOPs, and also enjoy spotting ways to improve how things are done — we’d love to hear from you ????



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

Inbox is managed, client tech + admin questions are solved

content is scheduled and published consistently

our audience feels seen, welcomed, and engaged

leads are tracked accurately and followed up efficiently

backend tasks are handled reliably and proactively

launches feel supported and less stressful (building the sales page, connected with active campaign, testing the funnel)

systems and processes become clearer and more streamlined over time



A great day in this role might sound like:

“Today I set up the backend for a new workshop as part of the launch process.”

“I welcomed new members into the community, responded to comments and messages, and added new leads into the CRM.”

“I managed the inbox, followed up on client requests, and made sure everything was responded to clearly and on time.”

“I updated client learning dashboards, uploaded replays, and made sure clients had what they needed.”

“I spotted a better way to handle a recurring task, updated the SOP, and made the process clearer and faster for the team.”



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Admin support: post scheduling, inbox/email management, platform updates, client support, and day-to-day tech/admin tasks

Process optimization: creating SOPs and improving existing workflows

Launch support: helping with quick-turnaround tasks during launch periods

Podcast management: editing episodes, scheduling releases, posting promo content, and updating guests

Social media & community support: posting content, engaging in comments/messages, and welcoming new members

Project support: supporting special projects based on your strengths and skills



This Role Is Perfect For You If You:

- have warm, confident English communication skills, both written and spoken

- naturally bring positive, grounded energy to your work

- are organized, reliable, and strong with time management

- have previous experience supporting coaches or online businesses as a VA

- enjoy social media, community engagement, and relationship-building

- are great at following instructions while also being resourceful and solution-oriented

- like improving systems and documenting processes as you go

- feel excited to be part of a growing business with a long-term vision

- can work 5–15 hours per week , spread across 5 days

- are sometimes available for light weekend support during launches

- are available during 9:00–18:00 Lisbon time



Your Tech Toolkit Should Include/You should have Experience with:

MUST: Instagram,
, ActiveCampaign, Canva, WordPress, Descript/Podcast Editing, AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude

NICE: Slack, ThriveCart, ClickUp, video editing tools like CapCut, ManyChat



* Some tools might be similar to what you’re using now. We have many SOPs and even though it’s great if you already use these tools, if you’re a fast learner and the perfect fit for the role it can still work out.



Hours, Pay & Growth

Part-time: 5–15 hours per week (10 on average)

Compensation: starting from $5–$12/hour, depending on experience, skill set, and level of independence

We’re open to growth in hours and compensation over time for the right person

This is a long-term role with room to grow as the business expands



Why You’ll Love Being Part of Our Team

Work remotely from anywhere with a strong internet connection ????

Join a small, supportive, purpose-driven team

Be part of a long-term project with room to grow

Contribute to a business that’s making a meaningful impact

Have space to bring your ideas and strengths to the role



Interested in the role? We’d love to hear from you! ????



IMPORTANT: Send me the word “MANGO” in your message when you apply, so I know you’ve read this text. That unlocks receiving a list of questions that I want you to answer so you can apply for the job!



(We have 2 quick rounds, deadline for this round is May 4th.)

title: Digital Marketer and designer
description:
Hiring: Full-Time Designer + Video Creator for Meta Ads (Philippines, Remote)



I run daily newsletter for founders, 130k+ subscribers, growing fast. We're based in Ireland.

I need a full-time designer who can also cut video. But this isn't just a design job. I need someone who understands how design works inside advertising - what makes a thumb stop, why one variant beats another, how creative drives CTR and CPA. If you've only made things that look nice, this isn't for you.



What the day looks like

* Regular calls with our Head of Growth to plan ad concepts

* You produce them — fast, in volume, with variants

* Mix of your own design/video skills and AI tools, including Weavy AI (it’s a new AI ad tool, very effective. No experience required)

* Other design work when it comes up — brand, landing pages, whatever the team needs?



What I need from you

* Real Meta ad experience. Show me ads that performed and tell me why.

* Strong design instincts for advertising specifically — hooks, hierarchy, message clarity

* Solid on static (Figma/Photoshop/Canva) and video (CapCut/Premiere/whatever)

* Already using AI creative tools. Bonus if you've used Weavy.

* Full-time, reliable, English fluency

* Ship volume without quality falling off?



The deal

* 1-week paid trial to start (fully paid, real work)

* If it clicks, full-time from there

* Room for pay increases as you prove out

* Looking to start as soon as possible?



To apply, reply with:

1. Portfolio link

2. Monthly rate (USD)

3. Time zone + when you can take calls

4. How soon you can start

title: Data Entry
description:
Would you be interested in a full
 VA opportunity, with genuine long term stability?



The type of employment where you don't need to worry about losing your job because the work isn't there anymore?



The kind of place which has a phenomenal working culture, a driven leader that treats you as a person, not just another number, and really values your work?



We have built an incredible Filipino VA team that all exhibit our 3 core values; trust, respect and honesty.



We are very selective over who we hire, as we want people that want to join, and stay with us for the long term.



The spine of our business has been with us for several years; if you are planning to work others jobs alongside this, this role isn't for you.



The most important thing we're looking for in a Virtual Assistant is someone with a great attitude, fantastic organisational skills and ownership/thinking outside of the box.



The kind of person that truly enjoys working as part of a team, has dynamism and a willingness to learn.



The role will be quite bespoke, and full training will be provided.



You will also have a mentor assigned to you specifically for as long as you need.



Above all, you’ll get the opportunity to make a really meaningful impact in a growing business!



The requirement will be for 40 hours a week between Monday and Friday, as well 8 hours between Saturday and Sunday, so 48 hours in total (UK time zone).



If interested, please answer the following (responded however you want is completely fine, and encouraged, but those that don't answer the below won't be considered):



-The monthly salary for this position is $200 (non-negotiable). Does that work?

-How would you rate your English out of 10?

-Please send an audio note, or even better, a video so I can hear your English.

-Please share a CV (resume).

-What is your age?

-Do you have a dedicated working space (no interruption of noise or other people)?

-Do you have 2 monitors and a headset?



We usually receive a large response from candidates, and being honest, favour those that have shown good tenure in previous companies. The people in our team demonstrated tenures in one company of 5-10 years.



So, if this sounds of interest, please respond and we will review your application :)



P.S. Please only apply if you intend to have this as your ONLY job and align with our core values, you want to join somewhere for the long-term and you have a good energy and vibes!

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
KittySpout is looking for a Direct Response Video Editor to join our team!



If you wish to apply - Please fill in our application form, we will not be reviewing online ph applications: 
 



As our video editor, you will be responsible for editing, producing, and managing multiple creative

projects with a heavy focus on paid ad creatives for Meta Platforms. You’ll take raw UGC and

transform it into high-converting direct response ads that scale across our paid channels.

We are looking to hire someone with 3+ years of work experience. The ideal candidate has prior

experience editing DTC e-commerce ads, understands direct response principles, and knows how to

structure short-form and long form video content that captures attention and drives conversions.



Who are we?

At KittySpout, we are transforming cats and their parents’ lives by developing products designed with

the help of expert veterinarians to create products that make taking care of cats easier while also

helping improve the health and happiness of cats around the world. We've scaled quickly to become

a multi 8-figure brand in under 4 years through viral digital marketing. KittySpout has helped over

600,000+ cat owners in just 4 years since launching with a small (but mighty) core team of under 20

people — and we are looking to continue our growth by finding a great video editor to play a pivotal

role in scaling!



What is our culture like & who is a good fit?

Culture-fit is our #1 factor when hiring! We have a genuine will-to-win. No work is beneath us if it

moves us towards our goals. We utilize creativity to do more with less – and quickly. We use data to

make decisions and live by the following three core values: work smart, overdeliver, speed is king,

and better everyday. We love learning – every problem is an opportunity to grow.



If you want a stress-free corporate 9-5 job, this isn’t it.

If you want to challenge yourself and shape a fast-growing company, work directly with the founders,

and see huge career growth by playing a big role in scaling it to $100m+… If you want to drive results

with a group of passionate, smart, hardworking people, work in an environment without politics or

corporate chicanery, and play a big part in our growth being hands-on and active, all while having a

generous performance bonus structure — then you’ve come to the right place.



Key Objectives

Consistent volume of 2-3 ad briefs per day (3 variants each)

Increase your performance bonus by analyzing prior video metrics to increase views and conversions.

Apply direct-response copywriting principles to review scripts.

Operate with a high degree of autonomy, managing your daily workload efficiently to meet

deadlines without needing hand-holding or frequent check-ins.

Quickly learn and master new tools and software, and editing techniques as social media

trends evolve, often with less than a day's notice.

Ensure every video meets our exacting quality standards and perfectly matches the provided

instructions, minimizing the need for revisions.

Maintain clear, proactive communication with the company founders and executive team,

providing updates when necessary.

Create ad variations and iterations to scale winning ads and improve performance.

Collaborate with the creative strategy team to bring ad concepts to life.

Apply direct response marketing principles to editing (hooks, problem/solution flow,

testimonials, CTAs).

Stay up to date on internet trends and editing styles to ensure our ads feel native and

engaging.



Requirements

Fully remote.

Fluent in English.

Proven experience creating short-form direct-response videos for DTC brands.

Proven experience with professional video-editing software is required. We have a strong

preference for CapCut Pro, but proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro is also acceptable.

Paid Ad Focus: Proven experience editing Meta/Facebook paid ads that convert.

Volume: Comfortable producing 3 ad briefs per day.

Tools: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (or equivalent editing tools).

Creative & Analytical Mindset: Ability to combine storytelling with data-driven feedback to

refine and improve ads.

No issue working overtime or on weekends if needed. You’re passionate about your work and

excited by the idea of producing ads that millions will see.

Excellent cultural fit as per our values above.

Excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders.



KPI’S you will own

3 daily briefs Quota

80% First-Pass Approval Rate: At least 80% of submissions require no revisions.



Accountabilities

Deliver 3 ad briefs per day

Weekly iterations on top-performing ads to drive continuous improvement.

Ensure ads are visually compelling, on-brand, and optimized for performance.

Work with the creative team to brainstorm and test new ad concepts.

Stay plugged into social media/UGC trends to keep our creatives fresh and competitive.

Troubleshoot underperforming campaigns by testing different edits, structures, and hooks.



This Role Is Not For You If

You are a meticulous video perfectionist who will spend hours refining a single transition or

effect. With a high daily quota, success in this role demands efficiency. Adhering perfectly to

the video template at speed is valued over spending extra time on minor details that don’t

contribute to views or conversions.

You thrive in highly collaborative, team-oriented environments with frequent meetings and

brainstorming sessions. This is a high-autonomy, "heads-down" role where you will be

working independently the majority of the time to meet your individual production goals.

You are a methodical planner who prefers stable, long-term projects and predictable

workflows. Our environment is inherently dynamic. The tools, guidelines, and video styles

can change overnight, and you must be able to pivot instantly without frustration.



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate

When hiring, we’ll work with you to define the KPIs you’ll be responsible for and set targets. This

removes ambiguity around wondering if you’re doing a good job after you start.

Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project with the current head of marketing, and

a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8–12 days of conducting these

interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.

For this role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited

about this business — and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are

headed.



If you wish to apply - Please fill in our application form, we will not be reviewing online ph applications:

title: Property Manager (Long-term career with paid holiday) (BPO or job-hopping VA's should not apply)
description:
Due to a period of development and growth LifeStyle are now looking to recruit a number of experienced Administrators and particularly those that have excellent client communication skills to join their dedicated and close-nit team.



Who are we:



LifeStyle are probably North Bristol's most active Letting & Estate Agents. We have been serving the local area for over 30 years and have established relationships with clients, partners and tenants.



We take care of over 1000 Landlords with approximately 3000 units that result in a fair number of daily rent payments that require processing.



We pride ourselves on having family roots and our staff turnover is extremely low. We are a team. We work hard, respect each other and enjoy the journey - together!



Responsibilities of the role:



Control the day to day elements of the property referencing process - ensuring prospective tenants are eligible for the property they wish to rent.



Liaising with tenants and landlords.



Operating different cloud based systems to ensure tenants are legal, eligible and insured for the property they wish to let.



You will be timely and not afraid of dealing with clients on the telephone or
.



You will be working to constant deadlines to ensure people can move in to their property.



What we are looking for:



Confident and client focused, clear speaking professional that is able to work at pace in a fast moving environment and to deadline.

An accomplished team player, who has a strong work ethic and wants to do a great job!

Highly organised with the ability to prioritise and multi task.

Meticulous and accurate with impeccable attention to detail.

Confident communicator with a good telephone manner.

Building relationships with people internally and externally with come naturally to you.

Most importantly - our roots are in a family run business. It is the core of LifeStyle.

We operate morally, ethically and lovingly as one big family with the respect and care for each other and our clients.



We are always on the look out for like-minded individuals. We believe it's what makes us who we are !



PLEASE NOTE:

There is a lot of Time-Wasters and people that try to get jobs or multiple jobs on Online Jobs. So we feel the need to clarify.



We have OVER 20 years experience hiring remotely - and the entry in this business begins at (GBP) £550 + £15 health benefit and 56 hours paid holiday. We pay in GBP.



We are also very aware that many rates on here are AGENCY rates. Typically the rates advertised by VA's is way off and it is people trying to be paid Agency rates via Direct to Consumer. These rates reflect US shift times. In BPO agency the standard pay is about $200.



Entry in this business begins at (GBP) £550 + £15 health benefit and 56 hours paid holiday. We pay in GBP.

That is approx 46,000 pesos.



This is a career with stability and team-value and not a VA/BPO job.

title: Director of Customer Acquisition DTC
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.

Ready to build something that shapes the future?

Every parent wants to give their child the best start. They want to see curiosity light up their eyes. They want confidence, not constant screen time. They want learning to feel joyful again.



At Hadley Designs, we create screen-free tools that help families rediscover connection through hands-on learning. We are scaling quickly. We are building boldly. And we are looking for a leader who can turn vision into profitable growth.



That’s where you come in.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand redefining early education through creativity, beauty, and connection. What began at a kitchen table has grown into a nationally loved brand trusted by millions of parents, grandparents, and teachers.



We believe learning should be fun and engaging.



We don’t just sell products, we shape futures.



We believe in screen-free, hands-on learning that builds confidence and connection. Beautiful design creates better learning.



Our mission is simple and powerful. Design screen-free products parents can trust to help their children learn, grow, and reach their full potential with confidence.



Our vision is bold. Build the most trusted children’s brand in the world. Reach $100M in revenue by 2030. Become a household name passed down for generations.



Now we are scaling our direct-to-consumer ecosystem. Shopify and TikTok Shop are our next major growth engines.



About the Role

As our Director of Customer Acquisition DTC, you are the General Manager of Shopify and TikTok Shop. You own the P&L. You own the strategy. You own the results.



Your Core Focus



-Scale Shopify and TikTok Shop to $20M+ in combined revenue within 18 months

-Achieve ?15% net margin on Shopify and ?5% on TikTok Shop

-Maintain Meta ROAS ? 2.0 and TikTok Shop ROAS ? 3.5

-Launch one new high-converting bundle-based funnel per month

-Drive
 and SMS to contribute ?25% of Shopify revenue

-Remove the CEO from daily ecommerce execution by owning strategy, systems, team, and outcomes



You are not here to manage tasks. You are here to architect a repeatable growth engine.



What You’ll Do



Traffic and Acquisition



-Partner with affiliate and UGC teams to scale winning creative

-Stay ahead of platform trends, formats, and policy updates

-Coordinate launches with Amazon for halo effects



Offers, Funnels, and CRO



L-aunch one new bundle-based funnel every month tied to educational outcomes

-Optimize CVR, AOV, CAC, LTV, upsells, and overall funnel economics weekly

-Oversee homepage, product pages, and collection merchandising

-Refactor and relaunch underperforming funnels with new hooks and offers

-Lead seasonal promotions including Back-to-School and Holiday campaigns

-Build and maintain funnel SOPs and testing roadmaps



Customer Nurture and LTV



-Lead lifecycle marketing through Klaviyo and Postscript

-Optimize welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back flows

-Build ascension paths from posters to workbooks to busy books

-Develop blog and SEO strategy to drive organic education-based traffic



Performance and Forecasting



-Review weekly P&Ls for Shopify and TikTok Shop

-Analyze AOV, CVR, CAC, LTV, ROAS, GP to CAC, and lifecycle revenue share

-Deliver weekly scorecards and monthly strategic growth plans

-Forecast performance and identify scaling levers



Team Leadership



-Lead and coach a cross-functional ecommerce pod of 6+ tea
mbers

-Establish clear ownership and weekly operating rhythms

-Hire and develop talent as funnel velocity increases

-Manage freelancers and specialized contractors

-Model Extreme Ownership, Relentless Innovation, and Integrity 

Above All



How Success Is Measured



-$20M+ DTC revenue within 18 months

-Consistent margin and ROAS targets achieved

-One profitable funnel launch per month


 and SMS driving at least 25% of Shopify revenue

-Documented systems that scale without founder dependency

-A high-performing team executing without burnout



Requirements



Who You Are



You think like a General Manager, not just a marketer.



You thrive in ownership. You love numbers. You respect creative. You build systems that make growth inevitable.



You align deeply with our values:



-Extreme Ownership. You solve problems and close loops without excuses.

-Relentless Innovation. You test boldly, learn fast, and iterate constantly.

-Integrity Above All. You report numbers accurately and tell the truth even when it is hard.



Experience That Sets You Apart



-5 to 10+ years in DTC ecommerce, especially Shopify and paid social

-Proven track record scaling ecommerce brands past $20M

-Experience owning revenue and profitability targets

-Deep expertise in Meta and TikTok Ads

-Hands-on experience with Klaviyo, Postscript, and Shopify CMS

-Strong background in bundles, upsells, and LTV optimization

-Ability to write and review high-converting landing pages

-Comfortable leading a fully remote team with clear weekly cadences



You are analytical and creative. Strategic and operational. Visionary and accountable.



You care about building something that lasts.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here



-You will have real ownership. Real trust. And real impact.

-Hadley Designs is a remote first company built on autonomy, creativity, and accountability.

-You will work closely with leadership, including the CEO, while having full authority to own your channels and decisions.

-Access to ongoing learning, training, and tools to sharpen your knowledge and strategies in the DTC space.

-You will be surrounded by A+ tea
mber that value excellence, growth, and doing the right thing.

-You will build something meaningful. Our products help families slow down, connect, and rediscover the joy of learning together.

-You will help shape a decade long vision to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world.

-Access Josh Hadley's vast network through his podcast Ecomm Breakthrough



To formally apply : apply here

title: Ecommerce Growth Strategist
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.

Ready to Lead and Scale Our E-Commerce Operations?



At Hadley Designs, we believe learning should be enjoyable, engaging, and screen-free. Millions of parents and educators trust our beautifully designed, developmentally aligned educational tools to help children grow and thrive. As a fast-growing, family-founded brand, we are on a mission to make learning meaningful for families around the world.



We are looking for an Ecommerce Growth Strategist to join our team and help scale our online sales. If you are a results-driven operator with a passion for building scalable e-commerce systems, optimizing performance, and driving growth through data-backed strategies, this is a unique opportunity to make an impact.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is redefining early education with creativity, heart, and purpose. Every product we create is hand-drawn and teacher-designed, crafted with care to build confidence and connection. Our screen-free tools empower families and teachers to make learning fun and meaningful, nurturing curiosity and creativity in children.



Our Mission

We design screen-free products that parents trust to help their children grow, learn, and reach their full potential. Our beautifully crafted, developmentally sound tools replace distractions with connection, curiosity, and real learning.



Our Vision

We aim to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world, present in millions of homes, reshaping how families learn, connect, and grow. Our products will be so widely used and passed down that generations of children will grow up learning from them and choose them again for their own families.



Role Overview

As the Ecommerce Growth Strategist, you will own the full P&L of Hadley Designs’ e-commerce operations, with a focus on growing our Amazon business and expanding our multi-channel online presence. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, optimizing product positioning, managing pricing, and leading promotional strategies across multiple online platforms. This is a high-impact role where your strategic and operational expertise will be critical to scaling the business and ensuring the long-term success of our e-commerce channels.



Key Responsibilities



-End-to-End E-Commerce Ownership: Manage all aspects of the e-commerce business, including revenue growth, margin optimization, pricing, advertising, and inventory management.

-Performance Optimization: Continuously optimize product listings, content, pricing strategies, and promotional plans to maximize conversion rates, sales, and profitability.

-New Product and Category Growth: Identify new product opportunities and market expansion avenues, and collaborate with internal teams to bring them to market successfully.

-Inventory and Demand Planning: Develop and execute plans to manage product demand, inventory levels, and risk mitigation, ensuring smooth and cost-effective operations.

-Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Operations, Supply Chain, and Design teams to ensure product availability and accurate messaging across channels.

-Data-Driven Strategy: Use data to guide decision-making, refine strategies, and improve key performance metrics across e-commerce platforms.



How Success is Measured



-Strong growth in online sales and profitability across multiple platforms, especially Amazon.

-Clear and predictable performance improvements through optimized strategies in pricing, promotions, and product listings.

-Consistent execution of marketing and sales strategies to expand market share.

-Efficient inventory management that balances growth with cost control.

-Cross-functional alignment that contributes to operational efficiency and scalability.



Requirements

Who You Are



You are a growth-oriented, highly analytical e-commerce operator who thrives on taking ownership and driving measurable outcomes. You have experience working with e-commerce platforms like Amazon and are excited to scale a high-growth business within a collaborative and performance-driven environment.



You Have:



-5+ years of experience managing e-commerce operations, preferably with Amazon Seller Central or similar platforms.

-A proven track record of growing revenue, improving profitability, and optimizing sales across e-commerce platforms.

-Strong analytical skills and the ability to use data to make decisions and improve performance.

-Experience in managing product positioning, pricing strategies, and marketing campaigns.

-A collaborative, results-driven mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.

-Ability to manage both strategic and tactical elements of e-commerce operations.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here



Impact: Your work will directly influence how families experience learning through the Hadley Designs brand.

Culture: Join a passionate, mission-driven team that values trust, creativity, and collaboration.

Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of a remote-first role with flexible working hours.



Benefits:



-Remote-first work environment

-Paid time off and holidays

-Access to learning resources and professional development

-Free access to Hadley Designs products

-Regular interaction with leadership, including the CEO and CMO

-Stability from a decade as a family-founded, mission-driven brand



Apply Today



If you’re ready to help shape the future of learning in a growing company, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now to join the Hadley Designs team as our Ecommerce Growth Lead, Amazon and help us create a lasting impact on families, educators, and children worldwide.



To formally apply, apply here:

title: Creative Design Assistant and Digital Illustrator
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications Reviewed on a Rolling Basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Design Assistant & Digital Illustrator to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, you’ll feel right at home here.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs



We believe in structured creativity. Success in this role means owning your projects and delivering high-quality designs that resonate with our customers while maintaining our visual standards. We’re looking for someone who thrives in a creative environment, is proactive, and possesses a strong attention to detail.



Every Design Assistant is expected to:



Learn the Playbook – Understand our design standards, expectations, and creative processes.

Apply the Playbook – Execute designs consistently, meeting project requirements and adhering to brand guidelines.

Enhance the Playbook – Suggest creative improvements and innovative design strategies after mastering the basic framework.

We value innovation grounded in proven execution and a clear understanding of design principles.



What You’ll Own



-Creation of high-quality, error-free design assets for advertising and marketing campaigns.

-Maintaining consistency in typography, color schemes, and layout across all platforms.

-Regular updates and design of storefront assets for Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms.

-Designing A+ Content templates and custom brand image ads.

-Handling urgent design needs for product launches and special projects.

-Working closely with leadership to ensure deadlines are met and projects are delivered on time.



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days, you will:



-Learn and execute Hadley Designs’ design standards with precision.

-Contribute fresh design ideas that align with the brand and improve our current processes.

-Deliver high-quality artwork that meets or exceeds expectations and is on-brand.

-Support Becca and leadership with urgent creative tasks and maintain consistency in all design work.



Apply Now, Lead Creativity, and Shape Our Future.



Requirements

Who You Are:



-2+ years of professional experience in graphic design or related fields, with a strong portfolio.

-Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, with a strong grasp of CMYK color management and print-ready file preparation.

-Excellent attention to detail and ability to produce high-quality visuals with minimal revisions.

-Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

-Comfortable receiving and implementing feedback while maintaining a high standard of work.

-Creative, collaborative, and self-driven, motivated by quality and continuous improvement.



Benefits

Why You’ll Thrive Here:



-Join a creative, high-growth company with an established 10+ year track record.

-Own significant projects and make an impact from day one.

-Flexibility to work remotely with a flexible schedule.

-Opportunities for personal development and direct interaction with the Chief Creative Officer.

-A culture of collaboration, trust, and innovation, where your contributions are valued.



Apply Now

If you're a passionate graphic designer who thrives in a dynamic and creative environment, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to join Hadley Designs and help shape the future of our brand!



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within four weeks of your application, please consider that as our decision to move forward with other candidates, but we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs.



To formally apply : apply here

title: eCommerce Business Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
Description

Ready to build something that truly matters?

Every parent wants clarity, confidence, and connection when it comes to their child’s learning. They want to feel proud of the choices they make and trust the tools they bring into their home. At Hadley Designs, we make that possible by creating products that turn everyday 
nts into meaningful learning experiences.



But none of that works without a seamless, trustworthy customer experience. A store that runs flawlessly. Messaging that is clear. Operations that feel effortless to the customer.



That’s where you come in.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand redefining early education through creativity, beauty, and connection.



We believe learning should be fun and engaging. We don’t just sell products, we shape futures. Our mission is to create screen-free, hands-on learning tools that build confidence, spark curiosity, and bring families closer together.



Every product we design is rooted in purpose. Beautiful design creates better learning, and every detail matters. From the first click to the 
nt a child lights up with understanding, we are committed to delivering an experience families can trust.



About the Role

Ecommerce Operations Manager



Also known as: Shopify Operations Manager | Ecommerce Operations Lead | Customer Experience Operations Manager



This role is the backbone of our direct-to-consumer experience. You will own the performance, accuracy, and clarity of our Shopify store from end to end.



Your mission is simple and powerful. Ensure every customer fully understands what they are buying and when they will receive it before they complete their purchase.



Your Core Focus

-Take full ownership of Shopify store operations and customer experience

-Eliminate inconsistencies across the site, including broken links, outdated promotions, and conflicting messaging

-Standardize shipping, split shipment, and pre-order communication across all touchpoints

-Build and document SOPs for all operational workflows

-Implement systems and automations that reduce manual work and customer confusion



What You’ll Do

Customer Experience Management (Daily)



-Respond to customer inquiries via Shopify inbox and social channels

-Process refunds, reships, cancellations, and order updates

-Triage and resolve support tickets based on urgency

-Identify patterns in customer feedback and recommend improvements

-Ensure all communication is clear, accurate, and aligned with current messaging



Order Operations and Fulfillment (Daily)



-Monitor order flow across Shopify, Base, and Amazon MCF

-Resolve failed orders, inventory issues, and discrepancies

-Coordinate with fulfillment teams to ensure timely delivery

-Manage split shipments, pre-orders, and out-of-stock scenarios

-Track and resolve missing or delayed packages



Store Integrity and Accuracy (Weekly)



-Audit the website for broken links, incorrect pricing, and outdated promotions

-Ensure consistency across product pages, landing pages, and collections

-Validate all messaging related to shipping and pre-orders

-Support promotion setup and ensure backend accuracy



Systems, SOPs, and Automation (Weekly)



-Build and maintain SOPs for recurring workflows

-Identify inefficiencies and implement automation using tools like Shopify Flow

-Optimize customer service platforms such as Gorgias

-Improve post-purchase experience and operational workflows

-Support system cleanup and tool evaluation



Growth Operations and Reporting (Weekly)



-Deliver weekly Shopify performance reports

-Track key metrics such as CAC, LTV, and funnel performance

-Identify trends, anomalies, and risks early

-Ensure data accuracy for decision-making



Compliance and Risk Management (Weekly)



-Maintain compliance across ADA, privacy policies, and tracking regulations

-Review product pages and campaigns for compliance risks

-Ensure all required tools and disclosures are functioning properly

-Stay updated on platform policies and changes



AI and Automation Ownership (Ongoing)



-Identify repetitive tasks and convert them into automated workflows

-Use AI tools to improve efficiency in customer service and operations

-Build prompt libraries and scalable systems

-Continuously reduce manual workload while maintaining accuracy



How Success Is Measured

-Reduction in support ticket rate per 1000 orders

-Reduction in reshipment rate per 1000 orders

-Zero compliance issues

-At least one new AI automation implemented per week

-Zero reported issues with broken links, incorrect promotions, or inaccurate information



Success looks like a store that runs without chaos. Orders flow cleanly. Customers feel confident. Problems are solved before they scale.



Requirements

Who You Are

You are a systems-driven operator who takes pride in getting the details right.



You think like an owner. You move quickly, solve problems independently, and take full responsibility for outcomes. You don’t wait for direction. You create clarity where others see complexity.



-You have 2 to 5 years of experience managing Shopify store operations

-You are highly detail-oriented and catch inconsistencies others miss

-You are a strong written communicator who can simplify complex information

-You have hands-on experience with order management, fulfillment, and customer service

-You understand Shopify apps, backend systems, and troubleshooting workflows

-You build systems, not just solutions

-You thrive in a fast-moving, high-growth environment

-You are comfortable working cross-functionally while maintaining ownership

-You believe in excellence over easy. You take initiative. You close loops. You care deeply about doing things the right way.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here

At Hadley Designs, your work directly impacts families around the world.



You are not just managing operations. You are helping create a seamless experience that allows parents to feel confident, supported, and proud of their choices.



You will enjoy:



-A remote-first environment that gives you flexibility and autonomy

-The ability to manage your schedule with trust and accountability

-Direct access to leadership and meaningful collaboration across teams

-Opportunities to build systems, implement ideas, and drive real impact

-Access to training, tools, and continuous learning

-A decade-strong, family-founded brand with a clear mission and vision

-Free access to products that are changing how children learn



Hadley Designs is a remote-first company built on trust, creativity, and autonomy. We’re a small but mighty team that believes in balancing excellence with flexibility.



Apply Today



Apply today and help us make learning fun, engaging, and screen-free for families everywhere.



To formally apply, apply here:

title: Virtual Estimator (Metal Fabrication)
description:
Apply here: 



Are you looking for a  remote work opportunity where your estimating and metal fabrication skills can shine? Join a well-established metal fabrication company based in Australia, specializing in tube and pipe bending, rolling, and custo
talwork. If you have hands-on experience in fabrication and a strong understanding of technical drawings and quoting processes, this role could be a great fit for you!



What you will be doing

• Follow up on open quotes in coordination with the admin/sales team

• Update pricing templates and maintain materials databases

• Assist in the handover of awarded jobs to the production team

• Manage quote records and track progress using CRM and job management tools (Pipedrive, AroFlo)

Who we are looking for

• Strong understanding of metal fabrication and tube/pipe bending processes

• 2+ years of experience in estimating or hands-on fabrication roles

• Ability to read, interpret, and create technical drawings

• High proficiency in Microsoft Excel or estimating software

• Proficiency in CAD design

• Familiarity with Pipedrive, AroFlo, or similar CRM/job management systems

• Trade background in fabrication is highly desirable

• Experience working for an Australian company or knowledge of Australian industry standards is a plus



Go to this link to apply:

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer – Investment & Data Analysis
description:
I am looking for an elite Graphic Designer to handle the

"packaging" for a new, high-end YouTube channel focused on global investment

analysis and economics.



Our target audience consists of high-net-worth, mature professionals. We are NOT

looking for "typical" YouTube thumbnails with shocked faces, red circles, or

loud/messy layouts. We are looking for an authoritative, minimalist, and

cinematic aesthetic. Think The Wall Street Journal meets Bloomberg.



Your Responsibilities:



  - Subject Isolation: Masking out complex subjects (assets, architecture, data

    points) to make them pop against a background.

  - High-Contrast Typography: Using clean, bold, and professional fonts that are

    perfectly legible on mobile devices.

  - Visual Psychology: Using specific color theory (Navy, Gold, High-Contrast

    Grays) to signal trust and authority.

  - Branding: Maintaining a 100% consistent layout across all uploads.



What We Offer:



  - Rate: $10 USD per thumbnail.

  - Workflow: I provide the high-res "hero" image and the specific data hook.

    You provide the creative execution.

  - Consistency: This is a long-term role with 1-2 thumbnails required every

    week.



How to Apply:



1.  Send a link to your portfolio. IMPORTANT: Only include examples of

    thumbnails or posters that look professional, clean, and data-focused. (Do

    not send gaming, anime, or "vlog" style thumbnails).

2.  Tell me your favorite font for high-readability on small screens.

3.  Start your application with the word "LEDGER" so I know you read this.



Note: Shortlisted candidates with a proven track record will be invited to a

paid trial task.

title: Customer Services (Calling)
description:
Would you be interested in a full
 Customer Service Representative (Calling) opportunity, with genuine long term stability?



The type of employment where you don't need to worry about losing your job because the work isn't there anymore?



The kind of place which has a phenomenal working culture, a driven leader that treats you as a person, not just another number, and really values your work?



We have built an incredible Filipino team that all exhibit our 3 core values; trust, respect and honesty.



We are very selective over who we hire, as we want people that want to join, and stay with us for the long term.



The spine of our business has been with us for several years; if you are planning to work others jobs alongside this, this role isn't for you.



The most important thing we're looking for in a Customer Service Representative is someone with a great grasp of the English language (both speaking and understanding), an amazing attitude, fantastic organisational skills and ownership/thinking outside of the box.



The kind of person that truly enjoys working as part of a team, has dynamism and a willingness to learn.



The role will be quite bespoke, and full training will be provided.



You will also have a mentor assigned to you specifically for as long as you need.



Above all, you’ll get the opportunity to make a really meaningful impact in a growing business!



The requirement will be for 40 hours a week between Monday and Friday, as well 8 hours between Saturday and Sunday, so 48 hours in total (UK time zone).



If interested, please answer the following (responded however you want is completely fine, and encouraged, but those that don't answer the below won't be considered):



-The monthly salary for this position is $400 (non-negotiable). Does that work?

-Please send an audio note, or even better, a video so I can hear your English.

-How would you rate your English out of 10?

-Please share a CV (resume).

-What is your age?

-Do you have a dedicated working space (no interruption of noise or other people)?

-Do you have 2 monitors and a headset?



We usually receive a large response from candidates, and being honest, favour those that have shown good tenure in previous companies. The people in our team demonstrated tenures in one company of 5-10 years.



So, if this sounds of interest, please respond and we will review your application :)



P.S. Please only apply if you align with our core values, you want to join somewhere for the long-term and you have a good energy and vibes!

You bring motivation, reliability, and a strong drive to reach goals.

Your potential matters

You only need the drive to make the most out of this opportunity. Everyone is welcome, no matter your background or experience.



Transparency

Because we receive many applications, we will reach out only to candidates whose profiles fit our current needs. This helps us keep the process fair and efficient.



If this feels right for you, apply now and show us why you would be a great addition to our team. Once you complete all steps, you will receive a response from us within forty-eight hours.

title: E-Commerce Video Editor (AI B-ROLL AND CHARACTERS)
description:
Quick Summary

Daily Output: 2–3 concepts (60–200 seconds each)



Focus: Ultra-realistic AI product b-roll & talking characters



Location: Remote



About the Role

We are looking for a High-Volume AI Video Editor who can operate at the intersection of creative storytelling and cutting-edge technology. This is not a traditional "trimming" role; you will be responsible for prompting and generating entire scenes from scratch. You must be able to produce 2 to 3 finished video concepts per day that look like they were shot in a million-dollar studio with revisions done.



Key Responsibilities

Rapid Concepting: Produce 2–3 unique video concepts daily, ranging from 60 to 200 seconds.



AI Product Cinematography: Generate ultra-realistic b-roll of product packaging with perfect lighting, textures, and fluid camera movements.



AI Character Creation: Build and animate hyper-realistic talking characters with seamless lip-syncing and emotive performance.



End-to-End Editing: Handle all prompting, upscaling, color grading, sound design, and final assembly.



Required Technical Stack

You must be an expert in the following tools to hit our daily output goals:



Video Generation: Runway Gen-3/Gen-4, Luma Dream Machine, or Kling.



Character/Voice: HeyGen (Avatar/Lip-sync), ElevenLabs (Voice), and D-ID.



Image/Product Gen: Midjourney (v6+) and Leonardo.ai (for consistent product styles).



Editing/Post-Production: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Desktop.



AI Enhancement: Topaz Video AI (for upscaling and cleaning AI artifacts).



Requirements

Speed: Ability to turn a concept into a polished video in under 3-4 hours.



Eye for Realism: You know how to spot and fix "AI-jank" (glitches, weird limbs, or unnatural lighting).



Proactive: You stay up-to-date with the weekly changes in the AI video landscape.



You work HARD and accurately do not apply if you do not know the difference between a british and american accent or cant product Ai voiceovers correctly with the correct emotion or do not have understanding of engaging shots that convert because you will waste your time.



Communication and hard work is key BONUS scheme is available and very lucrative.



How to Apply

Provide a link to your portfolio or a folder of your best AI-generated video work (specifically product b-roll and talking characters).



List the AI tools you are currently paying for or use most frequently.



Application Requirement: To prove you have high attention to detail, please start your cover letter or subject line with the secret word: NEURAL.



LEVEL OF AI EDITING AND B-ROLL CREATION NEEDED :

title: Advanced Excel & Google Sheets Specialist
description:
Advanced Excel And Google Sheets Specialist



Contract Role | Remote



We are seeking a highly skilled Excel and Google Sheets specialist to design and build advanced spreadsheet systems that track business performance, KPIs, and operational metrics.



This role is ideal for someone who is exceptionally strong with complex formulas, data modelling, dashboards, and automation, and who enjoys turning raw or fragmented data into clear, structured business intelligence.



You will work directly with the business owner to build spreadsheet systems that connect daily operational data with global reporting dashboards, helping leadership monitor performance across the business.



Key Responsibilities:



• Design and build advanced Excel and Google Sheets models

• Create KPI dashboards and business performance reporting systems

• Develop complex formulas and dynamic calculations

• Build daily task trackers and operational input sheets that automatically feed into global dashboards

• Create structured systems where team activity data flows into master reporting spreadsheets

• Clean, structure and transform datasets for analysis

• Implement visual dashboards for management reporting

• Develop spreadsheet systems that minimise manual work and reduce errors

• Troubleshoot and optimise existing spreadsheets



Required Skills



You must be extremely proficient in both Excel and Google Sheets, including:



Advanced Formulas

Array formulas

Nested IF logic

INDEX / MATCH

XLOOKUP

SUMIFS / COUNTIFS

QUERY

FILTER

INDIRECT

TEXT functions

Dynamic arrays

Data Analysis

Pivot tables

Data modelling

Data cleaning and transformation

Scenario modelling

Dashboard Development

KPI dashboards

Visual data presentation

Charts and performance tracking

Automation

Google Sheets automation

Excel Power Query

Excel Power Pivot

Optional: Google Apps Script



Nice to Have (Highly Valued)



• Experience building financial models or operational dashboards

• Experience designing business reporting frameworks

• Experience working with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM data

• Ability to integrate daily operational tracking systems with global reporting dashboards

• Experience with API connections or data integrations



What Success Looks Like



The successful contractor will be able to:



• Translate business questions into clear analytical frameworks

• Build spreadsheets that are structured, scalable, and easy to maintain

• Create professional KPI dashboards for leadership decision-making

• Design systems where daily activity tracking automatically feeds into business performance reporting



Engagement Structure



• Contract / freelance role

• Remote work

• Flexible hours

• Project-based with potential ongoing work



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of advanced dashboards or spreadsheet systems you have built

A short explanation of the most complex spreadsheet project you have completed

Which tools you prefer most: Excel, Google Sheets, or both



If you enjoy building high-performance spreadsheet systems that turn data into actionable insight, we would love to hear from you.

title: Sales & Account Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Work Hours:  Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Industry: Events, Experiential Marketing, Venue Partnerships, Fan Engagement



About Us



We are a growing Australian experiential services company specialising in photo booth experiences, venue installations, fan engagement and brand activations across sport, entertainment, and events.



We help brands connect with audiences through memorable activations and long-term venue partnerships. Our team is collaborative, targets outcomes, and champions quality client experiences.



Role Overview



We are seeking a highly motivated Sales & Account Manager to drive revenue and grow strategic relationships. This is a hybrid sales role - combining inbound lead conversion, outbound prospecting, and account management.



You will be responsible for:



 - Converting inbound enquiries into confirmed bookings

 - Prospecting new clients via LinkedIn, Instagram,
,
 and cold outreach

 - Securing new venue partnerships and installation agreements

 - Managing and growing existing accounts



This is not high-volume telemarketing - it’s strategic sales and business development with meaningful impact.



Key Responsibilities



 Inbound & Outbound Sales:

 - Respond to inbound enquiries and convert to bookings

 - Perform outbound sales activities (social selling, cold outreach)

- Identify and engage target clients such as professional sports clubs, sponsors, event companies, agencies and venues (cinemas, bars, entertainment centres, tourist attractions, etc)

 - Book discovery calls and follow up persistently



Account Management 

 - Manage existing client relationships

 - Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate

 - Maintain strong communication from booking through to event delivery



CRM & Reporting

 - Document all activity in our CRM (deals, tasks, follow-ups)

 - Maintain accurate pipelines for events, activations, venues

 - Meet monthly KPIs for activity and revenue



What We’re Looking For



Required

 - 3–5+ years in sales, business development or account management

 - Excellent written and spoken English

 - Proven success with outbound prospecting (LinkedIn,
, social outreach, phone)

 - Comfortable working with Australian clients during Australian business hours

 - CRM experience (e.g. GoHighLevel or similar)



Advantageous

 - Experience in events, experiential marketing, venues or sponsorship

 - A consultative sales approach (not transactional)

 - Comfortable with targets and tracking KPIs

 - Strategic Sales Plan creation and implementation



Compensation & Incentives



On-Target Earnings (OTE): Up to PHP 95,000+ /month (base + monthly performance bonuses)



Monthly Performance Bonus Structure Includes:

 - Event revenue growth bonuses for bookings closed 

 - Outbound activity and qualified meetings requirements

 - Venue partnership bonuses for installation agreements

 - Set commission on direct sales of photo booths



Why This Role?



 - Strategic sales role with both inbound and proactive outbound 

 - Opportunity to build long-term, high-value relationships

 - Clear performance incentives that reward results

 - Remote team with growth potential

 - Employer experience with offshore employees (high retention of emplyees from 2 to 5+ years)
