title: Cinematic AI Artist / Prompt Designer (Project-based)
description:
Job Title: Cinematic AI Artist / Prompt Designer



Create Work That Looks Indistinguishable from Reality



We’re not looking for someone who “plays around” with AI…



We’re looking for someone operating at the bleeding edge of cinematic AI. When people see your videos they won’t even know its AI.



DCS (Digital Content Studios) is an Australian-based video production company pushing hard into AI-driven cinematic content. We’re working on high-end commercial campaigns, starting with a premium skincare launch, and we need a specialist who can bring ultra-realistic concepts to life.



This is a project-based role with immediate work available, and a clear pathway to becoming a long-term or full-time creative partner as demand grows.



What you’ll be doing:

- Creating ultra-realistic, cinematic AI visuals (not stylized, not cartoon — real)

- Generating consistent characters, environments, and scenes across multiple shots

- Turning concepts and loose scripts into fully realised visual sequences

- Producing short-form content (15–30 second reels) with multiple variations

- Handling prompting, generation, and refinement end-to-end

- Collaborating on story, pacing, and visual direction



What we’re looking for:

- You are deeply experienced with AI image/video tools 

     - Higgsfield 

     - Nano Banana 

     - Kling 3.0 

     - Google Veo 3.1 

     - Whatever you are using to generate insane results

- You understand cinematic lighting, composition, lenses, and realism — not just prompting

- You can maintain character and scene consistency across shots

- You stay current with the latest tools, workflows, and techniques

- You have a sharp eye for what looks “real” vs what looks AI-generated

- You move fast, iterate quickly, and care about detail



Non-negotiables:

- If your work looks like AI, this isn’t for you

- If you’ve only casually used AI tools, this isn’t for you

- If you can’t produce consistent, high-end cinematic outputs, don’t apply



What you’ll get:

- Access to our paid AI tools and generation budgets

- High-end commercial projects (starting with a premium skincare campaign)

- Ongoing work as we scale AI production

- Opportunity to become a preferred contractor or full-time tea
mber



To apply:

Send through your best work — not average work.

Fill-out this form: 



We want to see projects where you controlled the outcome through your own prompting and direction.



Show us:

- Your most realistic, cinematic outputs

- Work with consistent characters/scenes

- Anything that made people say “that’s AI?”



If it doesn’t immediately impress, don’t include it.



This is for someone who wants to be at the forefront of cinematic AI — not catching up to it.



DCS

Digital Content Studios

title: Senior Print on Demand Designer — Long-Term Position with Growth Path (Kittl + Adobe Illustrator / Photoshop)
description:
About This Position

I am building a serious, long-term Print on Demand business on Amazon Merch and looking for one Senior Designer to grow with me over the next several years. This is not a quick gig. Currently I have 13.000 Design slots free. I want to find the right person and build a real working relationship — with stable income, performance bonuses, and growing responsibility over time.

If you're a senior designer who's tired of one-off projects and wants stable, fairly-paid work with a structured growth path, please read carefully.



Compensation Structure:

Base Salary: $500-1.200 USD/month (depending on experience and Design volume / We will talk about everything before hiring)



Performance Bonuses:

Sales Bonus: 

For every design, what sales the first time, you will get 1$ Bonus.

For every design that generates 5+ sales/month on Amazon, you receive an additional bonus. 

Top-performing designs can significantly boost monthly income.



Quarterly Performance Bonus: 

Based on overall output quality and consistency, paid every 3 months



13th Month Bonus: 

Standard Philippine practice, paid every December after 1 year of consistent work



Why hybrid pay? Your base salary is stable so you can plan your life. The bonuses reward you for designs that actually sell — meaning when I make money, you make more money. Aligned incentives.



Payment: Monthly // would be nice that you create a EUR account, but we can talk about that.



Phase Structure (Important — Please Read)

This position grows in stages:

Phase 1 — Paid Test (Week 1): 5 paid test designs based on real briefings from my catalog. This tests your skill, briefing comprehension, and communication style.



Phase 2 — 1-Month Trial (Month 1): Full base salary. We learn each other's working style. Daily communication, weekly check-in calls (15-
 min via
/Zoom).



Phase 3 — Ramp-Up (Month 2-3): Volume increases. Sales bonus structure activates. You start seeing additional income from your best designs.



Phase 4 — Long-Term (Month 4+): Full integration into my pipeline. Volume calibrated to what we both find sustainable. Quarterly bonus active. This is the position you stay in for years.





What You'll Do



Create high-quality t-shirt designs based on detailed niche research I provide

Work with both Kittl and Adobe Illustrator depending on project requirements

Cover multiple design styles confidently:



Typography and text-based designs (wordplay, slogans)

Vector illustrations with multiple elements

Vintage and retro aesthetics (sunsets, distressed effects, mid-century)

Modern and minimalistic designs

Also KI expierence important





Follow Amazon Merch technical specifications (4500×5400px, 300DPI,  transparent background, color requirements for light AND dark shirt versions)

Communicate proactively when briefings are unclear or you spot potential issues

Apply revisions promptly (max 2 revision rounds expected per design)



What I Provide



Niche research and keyword direction (you focus on design, I handle strategy)

Stable monthly base salary (after ramp up), paid on time every month

Performance bonuses that reward your best work

Paid Philippine national holidays

5 paid sick days per year (after Phase 2)

13th Month bonus after 1 year

Long-term working relationship — I want someone for years, not months

Flexible working hours — daily delivery is what matters, not when you sit at your desk



Requirements

Must have:



5+ years professional graphic design experience

Strong proficiency in both Kittl AND Adobe Illustrator (please specify your experience level with each in your application)

Proven Print on Demand experience (Amazon Merch, Etsy, Redbubble, or similar)

Portfolio showing diverse design styles — typography, vector illustrations, vintage, modern

Solid English communication (written, doesn't need to be perfect)

Ability to deliver consistently every working day

Independent problem-solver — you don't need micromanagement

Reliable internet and ability to use Google Drive/Dropbox for file delivery



Will be a strong plus:



Experience with US market would be great

Typography specialization

Vintage/retro design style mastery

Understanding of which design types convert on Amazon Merch

Experience using AI tools (Midjourney, etc.) as part of a manual design workflow (not as replacement)



Will NOT work for me:



Designers who copy from Pinterest, Etsy, or competitor stores (instant trademark and account-suspension risk)

Designers who use AI generators as the primary tool without significant manual editing

Designers managing many clients who treat my work as low priority

I respond within 48 hours to all serious applications. Looking for someone exceptional — if that's you, I'd love to hear from you.

title: Senior Video Ad Editor – DTC & E-Commerce
description:
Hello! I hope the job search isn't to hard on you, especially when gas prices are this high. I'm going to keep this post straightforward and easy to read. Just like everyone else, I hate those intimidating job posts, but I do need to scare away the people who don't meet the requirements, so I'll try to be as approachable as possible!



I'm looking for a senior-level video editor who fully understands e-commerce and DTC video ads. Not just someone who knows how to edit, someone who has built their own systematic workflow from script to final product through years of real, professional experience. You understand the message and emotion behind an ad, and you translate that into video that is engaging and actually performs.



That means: IF ANY OF THIS SOUNDS UNFAMILIAR TO YOU, YOU DON'T HAVE AT THE VERY LEAST 2+ YEARS OF PROFESSIONAL VIDEO AD EDITING EXPERIENCE, YOU CAN STOP READING & DO NOT APPLY! You will just make things awkward for the both of us.



But, if you know exactly what I mean and you have the years of working professional experience doing this exact sort of thing, please keep reading!



The specifics I'm looking for:



- Senior Level Experience:  Not only do you have the years of experience professionally editing video ads for e-commerce/DTC brands, but have very strong workflows for your creative process that can be implemented into the business. Able to leading other editors and manage a small team when needed. 



- Ad Scripts & Storytelling: At your level, your not just editing clips, you can fully internalize ad scripts. You understand the emotion, the message, the story arc, and who we're trying to reach. You know why ads work, and every creative decision you make serves that. If you don't understand basic ad structure, the importance of clarity, or what it means to put yourself in the audience's shoes, this is 100% not the role for you. Years of experience mean nothing without this.



- Current Trends: You're completely up to date on organic and paid social media creative trends/styles/formats. And this isn't just your job, it's something you're genuinely interested in. You should be the one bringing new trends to my attention and telling me how we can use them. If I mention a video style and you don't know what I'm talking about, that's going to be a problem. If I say "Pixar-style" and you don't know what I mean, you're not up to date.



- Capcut Mastery: You know how to use CapCut like the back of your hand. You're not just comfortable with it, you're fast, efficient, and you've developed workflows that let you execute edits much quicker than the average editor. You're the one teaching people how to use CapCut better, not the other way around.



- AI Video & Image Generation: If you're keeping up with trends, you already know how essential AI is in today's creative toolkit, and it's only getting more important. You've used tools like Higgsfield/Freepik extensively, you're up to date with all the current AI image and video generation tools as of April 2026, you understand the strengths and weaknesses of different models. You also have strong workflows for generating high-quality, realistic AI content because we'll be doing a ton of it. If you don't know what ChatGPT Images 2.0 is,  this isn't for you. If you don't know how to create anatomy or medical animations using AI, this isn't for you. If you can't tell me when to use NanoBanana 2 vs Kling 2.5, I don't think we could even be friends.



- Clip Sourcing: SUPER IMPORTANT! It is our bread and butter and something we do every single day. You know how to source clips from everywhere: TikTok, YouTube, the Meta Ads Library, free and paid stock footage platforms, etc. More importantly, you understand that the key to finding great clips, especially on social media, is knowing how to manipulate keywords based on the script and creative direction. You are an expert at this. If all you do is grab generic stock footage, you are wasting your time reading this post.



- Photo Editing: With your level of experience, you should also be comfortable with photo editing. You've used Canva, you've created and edited product images before, and you understand the difference between generic AliExpress-style images and polished, branded DTC images. You're able to take a generic product images and make it look branded for our website. With your knowledge of AI image generation tools, this should be easier to do than ever before.



- Fluent English & Strong Communication: It goes without saying, video editing at this level is deeply creative, and if you're not fluent in English, you won't be able to fully understand the creative direction I'm giving you, and you definitely won't be able to internalize an ad script the way this role requires.



The title says Senior, and I mean that. If we work well together, I want this to feel more like a partnership than a traditional employer/employee relationship. I've watched a lot of ads and developed a strong eye for what works, but I'm not the editor, you are. That means if I suggest a change that's clearly worse, I expect you to push back and tell me why. If you have a better idea, speak up. This is not a role where you blindly follow direction without thinking. You will also be expected to grow & manage the whole editing/creative team. Strong, clear, & honest communication for this role is non-negotiable. 



Role Details:



- Full-time position

- Must have a stable, consistent schedule

- Cannot have additional job responsibilities outside of this role

- And of course, salary is based on your experience and how well your skills align with this role



If you read to this point and everything I said sounds just like you, then you are probably the one I am looking for. Message me with the subject line "SENIOR EDITOR JK" (any msg without this will be ignored) and give me a quick breakdown of your professional experience (no personal projects), a summary of who you think I'm looking for, why you think your skills & experience are perfect for this role, and any relevant work you have done professionally that you think is will peak my interest! 



(just dumping a ton of ads you've done since 2022 in a google drive won't help, but if its curated and selected based on what you think aligns with the job posting,  you will stick out like a shining star!)



NO
S, THEY WILL BE IGNORED!

title: Sales Administrator
description:
Hey Future Figment Family Member!



Ever dreamt of turning heritage homes into works of art while working from anywhere? We're Figment—the rebels of hospitality, making the world a more human place to live, one conserved shophouse at a time.



Our boutique hotel inspired homes are hailed as the 'Picassos of Singapore's Built Heritage' by Travel + Leisure, with coverage from NYT, WSJ, The Straits Times to Channel NewsAsia. We've hosted over 4,000 members from companies like Grab, BCG (Boston Consulting Group), and Citi over the past 3+ years.



What Makes This Role Different:

- 100% Remote-First: Work from home, a café, or anywhere that inspires you. We're entirely results and KPI-driven (Key Performance Indicators = measurable outcomes), not face-time driven. Note: Remote-first means self-discipline and clear communication are essential.

- Accelerated Growth: Staff take on significant responsibilities from day one in our hands-on scrappy startup environment. As we aggressively expand our team, you'll grow alongside us with clear progression paths and potential phantom equity eligibility.

- Global Conservation Mission: As stewards of Singapore's architectural heritage, we're pioneering the boutique homes concept globally—from London townhouses to Spanish Colonial homes in Intramuros, Manila, to colonial bungalows across India.



Job Description:

The Sales Executive will be responsible for growing revenue for Figment. His or her mission is to ensure a high occupancy rate at the right price, while also curating a thriving community of members (tenants) for our homes. This is a highly operational role requiring organizational skill and a strong attention to detail.



Responsibilities include but are not limited to the following:

- Promptly follow up with each lead from enquiry to conversion or loss, across various channels

- Coordinate in-person viewings with Ground Leasing Representatives

- A goal-getter who is set on achieving revenue targets and is eager to close deals

- Excellent Executor with well thought-out work processes and suggestions. Solutions-oriented.

- Inform and Educate Leads on Figment’s Boutique Home products and services.

- Maintain and expand Figment’s Customer Relationship Management Database of Leads

- Critically examine existing sales processes and continuously propose improvements to achieve higher yield from the sales funnel

- Represent leads’ interests, perspectives, and feedback in company discussions and other initiatives relating to sales, marketing, and product



Requirements:

- Excellent written English is a must for responding to daily enquiries

- Strong communication skills to serve our target market

- Strong Administrative Skills, someone who is highly-motivated, meticulous and highly-efficient in administrative tasks and customer service over text and call.

- Ability to juggle a high volume of work and multiple outstanding tasks, with clear timelines, action plans and next steps. Fast - Learner with quality work is an absolute plus.

- High EQ and excellent interpersonal skills, including the ability to articulate customer problems/needs and find the solutions of best fit

- Bachelors Degree as a minimum requirement.

- Prior hospitality, tourism, and/or property management experience preferred

- The individual should be able to work on all weekends and Singapore Public Holidays.

- The starting allowance will be S$30 per shift.



If you like getting your hands dirty, and if you relish the opportunity to grow with an exciting start-up and make a big impact from Day One, then this role is for you! Apply now -->

title: Video editor for my Personal Finance YouTube channel
description:
I am looking for a professional to create / edit one YouTube video about personal finance content aimed at the 40+ demographic. 

The length of the video should be between 10-12 minutes long and pay $20 dollar per video.

I would be looking for approximately 3 videos per week, resulting 3 videos per week * 4 weeks * $20 per video = $240 per month.

 

I will provide the script and voice over. (You will not have to do any research regarding the video topic for the video, you will have to find clips/photos/background music/etc to create the video).



The type of video editor I am searching for is to execute a "Financial Noir" aesthetic for an investigative documentary channel. The style must be cinematic and clinical, prioritizing high-contrast "low-key" lighting with deep shadows and a muted navy/gold color palette. I require a deliberate, sophisticated editing pace that avoids "fast-cut" cliches, focusing instead on macro-textures, slow camera drifts, and translucent monospaced HUD overlays. Think Mindhunter meets high-end financial audits—atmospheric, authoritative, and expensive. We value an editor who can interpret this moody, "secret briefing" vibe while maintaining a high standard of visual grit and tension.



I am therefore are looking for someone who:

- Has experience/work in creating YouTube videos

- Has experience using video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro or like software

- Fluent in English

- Able to work within the deadline (24 hours) - including for these samples.

 

The style should adhere to our brand guidelines as per above. This may change across channels.

However, you can be very creative to make the video entertaining and engaging, including the use of AI.



When interested, please provide minimum of 3 videos examples matching to my type of channel.

Please provide links to Google Drive/ Dropbox, NOT any attachments.

 

If you have read until the end of this job description, please type your favorite sport at the beginning or end of your proposal.

title: Senior Direct-Response Video & AI Editor (Top 1% Talent Only)
description:
I run a fast-growing D2C health and wellness brand in the fungus niche. I am looking for a top-tier video editor who understands consumer psychology, retention, and how to build high-converting direct-response creatives for social platforms.



You will not be coming up with the core concepts. You will be provided with a proven script, an example video (from a competitor or organic TikTok), and detailed editing notes. Your job is to take those assets, source the right visuals, utilize advanced AI generation tools, and assemble creatives that perform.



What You Will Do (10-20 Ads Per Week):

Ad formats will vary. Some will be standard UGC-style edits, while others will heavily rely on AI generation. You need to be highly adaptable and comfortable with the following:



Asset Collection: Sourcing clean, relevant B-roll and watermark-free UGC.



AI Character Generation & Animation: Generating highly realistic AI characters (doctors, regular consumers, etc.) using tools like Higgsfield Soul 2.0, Nano Banana, or ChatGPT. You will then animate them and sync audio using Kling 3.0 and HeyGen.



3D Visuals: Creating and animating hyper-realistic 3D macro illustrations for B-roll to visualize how the product works beneath the surface.



Editing & Assembly: Combining all assets in CapCut with precision pacing. You will add subtle SFX, auto-generate and refine captions, and layer B-roll effectively.



Aggressive Hook Testing: For every core ad body you build, you will create multiple hook variations (e.g., split screens, close-ups, varying AI characters) to maximize our testing pipeline.



What We Offer:



All Tools Provided: The business will pay for all necessary premium subscriptions (Kling, HeyGen, ChatGPT Plus, Nano Banana, etc.).



Flexible Schedule: I am based in Australia, but I do not care what timezone you work in or when you log on, as long as the weekly volume and deadlines are met.



Professional Growth: We will have weekly calls to break down ad performance, analyze the data on what is winning, and continuously sharpen your direct-response skills.



Aggressive Bonuses: You will receive a base salary of $1,500 USD/month, plus a $75 USD bonus for every "winning" ad and a $250 USD bonus for every "mega-winning" ad you produce. (We expect 15-25% of the ads you edit to be winners).



Requirements:



Elite-level proficiency in CapCut.



Strong familiarity with AI generation and animation tools (Kling, HeyGen, Higgsfield, Nano Banana, Midjourney).



A deep understanding of direct-response pacing (pattern interrupts, hook retention, consumer psychology).



Attention to detail test: When you apply, make the subject line of your message "Blue Ocean Editor" and tell me your favorite movie. Applications without this will be instantly deleted.



The Hiring Process:

After reviewing portfolios, the top candidates will be given a paid test. You will be provided with assets and a script to complete 1x video. This allows us to see your pacing, AI generation skills, and turnaround time in a real-world scenario.

title: Video Editor / Static Ads Designer for Ecom Brand
description:
We’re looking for a Video Editor with static ads experience to join our growing ecommerce brand.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



Fill in the application form: 
/to/O40RINeW



Important note: Put “CFM” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Full-Time Video Editor – Testimonial & Short Form Ads (Marketing Agency)
description:
44 Studios is a US-based marketing agency running paid media and content for service-based clients across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram.



The Core Skill We’re Hiring For



Long form testimonial editing. We shoot unscripted client testimonials and you need to take raw footage and find the story — Pain, Agitate, Solution, Result — and build it into a documentary-style edit that feels authentic and emotionally compelling. No scripts. No hand-holding. You find the gold and you build the arc.



If you can do that well, short form is no problem.



What You’ll Also Edit



 • Short form ads for Meta and TikTok with heavy animation, motion graphics, and sound effects

 • Organic short form content (Reels, Shorts, YouTube Shorts)

 • Top, mid, and bottom funnel ad creatives

Technical Requirements

 • DaVinci Resolve only — no exceptions

 • Must know shot matching and color correction

 • Must be able to read and work with DaVinci scopes (waveform, vectorscope, parade)

 • Full color grading is not required

Requirements

 • 2+ years editing marketing or documentary-style content

 • Near-perfect written and spoken English — this will be assessed from your application message

 • Strong understanding of American culture, humor, slang, and western consumer behavior — you must be able to understand the tone and context of what we’re producing without explanation

 • Minimum 100 Mbps internet connection (required, not negotiable)

Portfolio Requirements — All Three Required



 1. Long form unscripted testimonial or documentary-style edit

 2. Short form organic content examples

 3. Short form Meta ads — must demonstrate heavy animation, motion graphics, and sound design



To Apply



Failure to respond in the following format will result in your application being ignored.



Reply with only the following:



 • English fluency: X/10

 • Ad editing skills: X/10

 • Long form documentary-style editing: X/10

 • Western culture understanding: X/10

 • Shot matching & color correction: X/10

 • 3 short form ad examples

 • 3 long form unscripted documentary-style examples

 • Confirm you use DaVinci Resolve



Details



 • Full-time (40 hrs/week)

 • Rate: $600–$900/month DOE

 • Paid via Wise

 • Direct hire — no agency, no middleman????????????????

title: Operations Assistant (Ecommerce / Finance / Logistics / Customer Service)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable Operations Assistant to support two growing Australian businesses:



Ecommerce fitness equipment company (
)

Cake shop with physical and online stores (
)

You will be responsible for helping manage day-to-day operations across customer experience, ecommerce, finance admin, and logistics.

Your goal is simple:

Make the business run smoothly without constant supervision

You will work directly with the business owner and play an important role in improving systems over time.

Website chat

Reviews (Google, etc.)

Excellent written English (customer-facing level)

Senior operations role

How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To apply, complete this form:

Final Note

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Job Overview:



We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Digital Marketing Specialist to support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing strategies for clients. This role involves conducting audits, analyzing performance data, and translating insights into actionable recommendations that drive measurable growth.



The ideal candidate is proactive, data-driven, and able to communicate insights clearly in English to both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

- Meet clients to understand business goals, target audience, and challenges

- Research and review client digital presence (website, SEO/SEM, social media)

- Conduct audits to identify strengths, gaps, and growth opportunities

- Support SEO (keyword research, on-page optimization) and SEM (campaign setup, monitoring, basic analysis)

- Use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to analyze traffic, user behavior, and conversion trends

- Translate data into simple, client-friendly insights and recommendations

- Prepare clear audit and performance reports

- Collaborate with the team on digital growth strategies

- Stay updated on digital marketing trends and tools



Qualifications:

- Basic knowledge of SEO, SEM, and digital analytics

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks

- Team player with a proactive mindset



Key Output:

- Audit reports with actionable recommendations

- Performance insights and data-driven suggestions

- Clear, easy-to-understand client reports

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Company: Right Side People

Schedule: Monday to Saturday | 10:00 to 19:00 Singapore Time



Role summary



Own strategy and hands on execution for paid growth in Singapore and other tier one markets. You will plan, launch, and scale on Google Ads, Meta, and YouTube, keep tracking accurately, and report results that tie spend to revenue. This is not a junior role. We are looking for an operator who can work independently.



What you will do



Paid media

Build and run full funnel campaigns on Google Ads, Meta, and YouTube for lead gen and e commerce

Set up accurate measurement using GA4 through GTM, Meta Pixel with Conversions API, Enhanced Conversions, clean UTM naming

Do keyword and audience research for Singapore and tier one markets, set negatives, test match types, create audience signals

Design simple test plans for creatives, audiences, bids, and landing pages, scale winners, cut waste

Produce weekly reports in Looker Studio or Sheets with ROAS, CPA or CPL, CAC, MER, and next actions

SEO

Run technical SEO audits and fixes using Screaming Frog or similar, improve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site architecture

Own on page SEO across priority pages and blogs including titles, metas, headers, internal links, schema markup, and image optimization

Build keyword maps for Singapore search intent including local modifiers and MRT area patterns, plan content briefs that match search intent

Manage Google Search Console hygiene, submit sitemaps, resolve coverage issues, monitor queries and CTR

Lead a simple and clean link acquisition plan using content based outreach and partnerships that meet quality standards

Partner with content and dev to ship changes that move rankings and conversions



Must have



3 to 5 plus years managing paid media and SEO with measurable results for Singapore brands or other tier one markets

Strong tracking setup across GA4, GTM, platform pixels, correct conversion actions, data hygiene

Technical SEO fundamentals including crawl budget basics, internal linking, structured data, Core Web Vitals, and page speed

Proven on page SEO execution and keyword research that drives ranking and revenue, not only traffic

Clear written English, reliable communication in SGT hours, proactive status updates

Portfolio with real accounts or sites you owned or co owned showing budgets, timelines, outcomes

KPIs you will own

Paid ROAS and MER, CPA or CPL and CAC, conversion rate, qualified lead volume, waste reduction and profitable scaling

SEO Organic sessions and qualified leads, rankings for priority SG keywords, pages indexed and CWV pass rate, CTR and impressions from GSC

Tools you should know

Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, YouTube, GA4, GTM, Google Search Console, Screaming Frog, Ahrefs or SEMrush, Looker Studio, Google Sheets, Slack, Loom





How to apply



Send one
 or doc with:

Three short case studies from Singapore or tier one markets covering objective, budget range, time frame, platforms or SEO scope, and results

Screenshots of platform dashboards, GSC, and sample reports with sensitive info redacted

One page outline of your tracking architecture for GA4 and GTM and your technical SEO audit checklist

A two minute Loom explaining one paid test and one SEO win and what you changed based on results

Internet speed test, computer specs, earliest start date

title: Creative Strategist (Full-Time) — Shraks
description:
We're looking for a Creative Strategist to join the Shraks team full-time. Shraks is a sneaker-style safety shoe brand disrupting the traditional workwear footwear space across Europe — combining the comfort and look of a sneaker with the protection of a safety boot.

What you'll do



Develop winning ad concepts and scripts for Meta and other paid social channels

Lead creative research — analysing competitors, customer reviews, and market trends to find new angles

Work closely with the team to brief, iterate, and scale what's working

Use AI tools to speed up creative production and testing



What we're looking for



Proven experience as a creative strategist for DTC brands

Strong understanding of performance creative and what drives conversions on paid social

Hands-on experience using AI tools in the creative process

Ability to think in hooks, angles, and emotions — not just features

Experience with fashion, lifestyle, or footwear is a plus



To apply

Send us your best ad script for a sneaker-style safety shoe. Show us how you'd sell the shift.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA GROWTH & CONTENT STRATEGIST
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA GROWTH & CONTENT STRATEGIST 

(Storytelling Brand | Modern Luxury & E-commerce Content Ownership Role)

?



TOP 3 REQUIRED SKILLS



1. Strategic Content Curation – Ability to sift through large content banks and identify high-performing visual assets for different platforms.

2. Data-Driven Growth Marketing – Strong understanding of platform algorithms, keyword/hashtag research, and organic growth strategy.

3. Creative Storytelling & Copywriting – Ability to translate African heritage, craftsmanship, and identity into compelling, conversion-driven content.



?



ABOUT THE BRAND



Maison Mnandi Africa is not just an e-commerce business — it is a storytelling brand rooted in African heritage, identity, and modern luxury aesthetics.



Explore our world here:

• Instagram: 
==

• Website (Shopify): 



We exist at the intersection of:

• Authentic African craftsmanship

• Contemporary global luxury aesthetics

• Emotional storytelling through visual culture



Every product carries meaning. Every visual tells a story. Every touchpoint must feel intentional, elevated, and refined.



We are intentionally building a brand that feels editorial, timeless, and globally relevant — not trend-driven or mass-market.



?



THE ROLE



We are looking for more than a social media manager; we are looking for a Social Media Growth & Content Owner.



You will be the bridge between our rich creative content bank and our technical growth engine. You will work directly with the Founder on creative direction and collaborate closely with an E-commerce Growth Lead to ensure content drives both brand equity and measurable revenue impact.



This is a high-ownership role where you will be expected to think independently, execute consistently, and continuously improve performance without constant direction.



This role is measured by one thing: growth.

If you cannot translate content into reach, engagement, and traffic, this role is not for you.



?



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Strategy & Execution



• Audit, organize, and strategically deploy a large existing content bank (photos, videos, reels).

• Build and manage a high-performing content calendar across Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and
.

• Repurpose content for maximum reach, longevity, and impact.



?



Growth & Performance



• Drive and scale organic growth (reach, engagement, followers, saves, shares).

• Conduct deep research into keywords, hashtags, and platform trends.

• Align all content with conversion goals (traffic, engagement, sales contribution).

• Ensure content supports Shopify performance goals, including product discovery and engagement-to-click behavior.



?



Storytelling & Aesthetic Direction



• Maintain and evolve a modern luxury visual aesthetic (clean, intentional, elevated, editorial-grade execution).

• Ensure all content feels globally competitive while remaining culturally authentic.



?



TOOLS & TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



• Asset Management: Google Drive / Dropbox / 
c

• Scheduling: Later / Planoly / Buffer



You should already be comfortable using these tools in a fast-moving content environment without training.



• Hardware: Reliable high-speed internet and ability to handle high-resolution visual assets



?



WHO YOU ARE



• You think like a strategist AND execute like an operator

• You have a strong eye for modern luxury aesthetics — clean, intentional, editorial-grade visual direction

• You understand how to make culturally rich content feel globally premium and visually elevated

• You are deeply passionate about storytelling, culture, and brand building

• You take full ownership of results, not just tasks

• You are highly organized and comfortable managing large content libraries

• You understand both creative direction and performance marketing

• You stay ahead of trends and know how to apply them intentionally

• You are proactive, not reactive



?



PLATFORMS YOU MUST UNDERSTAND



• Instagram (Reels, Carousels, Growth Strategy)

• TikTok (Trend adaptation + storytelling)

• Pinterest (Traffic generation)

•
 (Distribution + retargeting support)

• Bonus: YouTube Shorts



?



COMPENSATION



Monthly Salary: $800 USD (Flat Rate)



We are looking for a long-term partner, not a temporary freelancer. As the brand grows and the role evolves, there is a clear path for increased responsibility and compensation based on performance.



?



HIRING PROCESS



Practical Paid Trial



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a 3-day paid practical trial task.



This task simulates real work within Maison Mnandi Africa and includes:

• Content organization and curation

• Creative execution and storytelling strategy

• Social media structure and growth thinking



Candidates will be evaluated on:

• Creative taste

• Strategic structure

• Ability to transform raw content into a cohesive, premium brand narrative



The goal is to assess real-world thinking and execution ability, not just CV strength.



?



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



1. Links to social media accounts you have managed or grown

2. Specific results (growth metrics, engagement improvements, etc.)

3. A short paragraph on how you would organize and monetize a large heritage-focused content bank

4. Your favorite social media analytics tool — and why



?



To show us you have an eye for detail:



Start your application with the word “MNANDI” in all caps, followed by:

• One sentence on what “Modern African Luxury” means to you

• One specific content idea you would test in your first 7 days based on our Instagram and website



?



IMPORTANT



We are only looking for high-caliber applicants ready to take ownership, think strategically, and build something exceptional.



This is not a posting job — it is a brand growth and aesthetic ownership role.

title: Social Media Designer & Editor

title: Creative Graphic Design Assistant
description:

Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Graphic Design Assistant to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.

About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.

Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, apply here:

title: Perfectionistic Shopify website builder
description:
About the Company



WELLBALANCE SL is a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple Shopify stores across Europe and North America, with a strong focus on Google Merchant Center–compliant scaling. We operate with a fully remote team and structured SOPs, checklists, and internal controls to ensure consistency and long-term scalability.



To support our growth, we are looking for a highly precise Shopify Store Setup Specialist whose sole responsibility is building Shopify stores from scratch, with a strong emphasis on structure, accuracy, and compliance. This role is not about marketing, CRO, or design creativity — it’s about doing things by the book.



Tasks

 • Build new Shopify stores from scratch using predefined templates, SOPs, and checklists

 • Set up store structure, pages, navigation, policies, and settings exactly according to internal guidelines

 • Ensure every store is 100% compliant with Google Merchant Center policies

 • Prepare stores so they are fully approval-ready for GMC, with zero missing requirements

 • Follow SOPs precisely and document completion for each store

 • Perform thorough quality and compliance checks before internal handover

 • Build 2 fully compliant Shopify stores per week, with the ability to scale output over time while maintaining quality



Requirements

 • Proven experience setting up Shopify stores from scratch

 • Strong understanding of the Shopify backend (settings, pages, policies, navigation, structure)

 • Experience working with Google Merchant Center requirements and compliance

 • Extremely detail-oriented and precise

 • Perfectionist by nature — you catch small mistakes others miss

 • Able to follow instructions, templates, and checklists without deviation

 • Fast execution without sacrificing accuracy

 • Ability to consistently deliver error-free work at scale



Benefits

 • Fully remote position

 • Long-term collaboration with a fast-scaling e-commerce group

 • Clear processes, templates, and expectations

 • Competitive compensation based on experience and output



How to Apply



Please apply with:

 • Your resume

 • A short explanation of why precision and structured work suit you

 • Examples of Google Merchant Center–compliant Shopify stores built from scratch



If you enjoy building things perfectly, consistently, and by the book, this role is for you.

Title: Python Web Automation Developer (Remote, Long-term)



Company: Autotel — Automation Solutions



Salary: $
+/month (based on output, not hours)





DETAILED BREAKDOW : 



About Us:

We build automation solutions for businesses worldwide. We have an internal platform with ready-made templates, built-in tools, and step-by-step guides. You don't build from scratch, you use our system.



What You'll Do:



Write Python automation scripts that navigate websites and complete specific flows

Code directly inside our online platform, no local setup needed, everything runs in our built-in script editor

Use our internal templates (just fill in the automation steps)

Follow guides already built into our dashboard

Use AI coding tools (Claude Code, ChatGPT, etc.) with our ready-made prompt templates to generate scripts in minutes

Test scripts live from our dashboard with real-time logs and screenshots

Handle captchas using our provided 2captcha API key (supports 20+ captcha types, follow 
/api-docs)

What You Need:



Basic Python knowledge

Some experience with Selenium or similar browser automation

Ability to inspect web pages (find buttons, inputs, CSS selectors)

Self-motivated, can work independently

Good English communication

Nice to Have (not required):



Experience with Playwright or Puppeteer

Web scraping experience

Familiarity with anti-bot systems

What We Provide:



Built-in online script editor, code, test, and publish all from your browser

Ready-to-use script templates

Full documentation and guides inside our dashboard

AI prompt templates, paste into Claude Code or ChatGPT, describe the website steps, get a working script in minutes

2captcha API key provided for captcha solving (you implement using their documentation)

Proxy management handled automatically by the system

Live testing with real-time logs and screenshots

Clear payment structure, no surprises

With our templates, guides, and AI prompt system, even complex scripts can be built in 15-30 minutes. Most of the work is just inspecting a website, identifying the steps, and letting AI + our templates do the rest.



Script Requirements:



All scripts must follow our internal template structure and pass our compliance checker before submission. Our dashboard has a built-in compliance tool that verifies your script meets the required format.



Automation flows must be smooth and reliable. Use our smart waiting functions that automatically adapt to proxy speed variations. Scripts that break on slow connections will not be accepted. Our templates provide built-in methods for this, just use them instead of raw Selenium commands.



Payment Structure:



We don't track hours. We don't track when you work. We only track output. You're paid based on what you deliver.



Minimum Baseline: $500/month



40 scripts published with working automation flows

At least 20 must pass our internal test

This is the minimum we expect, realistically about 2 hours of work per day

Breaks down as: $250 fixed salary + ~$250 from per-script earnings

Per Script Earnings:



Your Test passes (V1):



Component Pay

Base (automation flow works) $2

+ Site needs account/login +$1.5

+ Site has captcha +$1.5

+ Site needs
 verification +$1

Range per script $2 - $6

Internal Confirmation Bonus (V2): When we confirm the script works on our system, you earn double the V1 amount for that script.



V1 only V1 + V2

Simple script $2 $4

Full complexity $6 $12

What Serious Developers Earn:



40 scripts is the baseline. Developers who take this seriously produce 80-100+ scripts per month. The work becomes routine, most sites follow similar patterns, and with AI tools you can generate scripts very fast.



Monthly output Estimated earnings

40 scripts (baseline) ~$500

60 scripts ~$
scripts ~$
+ scripts ~$
+

The more you produce, the more you earn. No cap.



If you don't reach the 40 script baseline, the $250 fixed salary is not paid and you receive only the per-script earnings. We believe 40 scripts is very achievable given the tools we provide.



These rates reflect the tools and infrastructure we provide. You're not building from scratch, not managing servers or proxies. The templates, AI prompts, and live testing tools do the heavy lifting. Your job is simply to follow the automation steps, and the system handles the rest.



Bonus System (coming after onboarding):

Every 45 days, we review how much your scripts contributed to our ecosystem. Top contributors receive additional bonus payments based on real impact. Details shared after you join the team.



Trial:



3 days, 3 simple scripts

All 3 must pass both your test (V1) and our internal test (V2)

You're free to complete all three in one day or even a few hours if you wish

Paid per script during trial

If successful, move to full position

How to Apply:

Send a brief intro and your experience with Python/Selenium. No CV required, just tell us what you've automated before.

title: Meta Ads Specialist (eCommerce Focus)
description:
Meta Ads Specialist (eCommerce Focus)  

Remote, Full-Time



About the Role

We're an Australian eCommerce business in the beauty, cosmetics, and haircare space looking for a skilled Meta Ads Specialist to own our paid social advertising end-to-end. This isn't a support role. You'll have direct responsibility for campaign strategy, execution, and performance across
 and Instagram, with real visibility into results and a clear path to grow with the business.



We're a small, focused team. You won't be managing 20 other client accounts on the side. This role is dedicated to our brand, which means your work actually moves the needle and you'll see it.



What You'll Be Doing



Build, manage, and 
 Meta ad campaigns across
 and Instagram, primarily focused on eCommerce conversions



Develop and test audience strategies including cold, warm, and retargeting segments using custom and lookalike audiences

Set up and maintain Meta Pixel, Conversion API, and Events Manager to ensure accurate tracking

Run structured creative and copy A/B tests and act on results, not just report them

Monitor daily spend, ROAS, CPA, CTR, and CPM and make proactive adjustments without waiting to be asked

Report on performance through Triple Whale and Google Analytics 4, producing clear weekly summaries with your own analysis and recommendations



Manage tasks, timelines, and documentation through Jira and Confluence alongside the wider team

Collaborate on campaign assets, promotional calendars, and product launches

Stay current with Meta algorithm changes, policy updates, and platform features





Bonus Skills (Not Required, But Will Set You Apart)

Experience building or optimising Shopify landing pages is a genuine advantage here, particularly with PageFly or Instant. If you understand how the post-click experience affects conversion rates and have hands-on experience building or testing product pages and advertorial-style landing pages, that puts you ahead of the field. Any broader funnel experience — lead capture, upsell flows,
 integration — is also worth mentioning.



What We're Looking For



- Minimum 3 years of hands-on Meta Ads experience managing campaigns independently

- Previous experience running paid campaigns for beauty, cosmetics, or haircare brands is strongly preferred. You'll understand the customer, the creative style, and the compliance considerations that come with the category

- Proven eCommerce track record. Catalogue ads, dynamic retargeting, and purchase-focused campaign objectives are your bread and butter

- Solid grasp of attribution in a post-iOS 14 environment. You know why last-click numbers lie and what to do about it

- Comfortable managing ad spend of AUD $5,000–$20,000+ per month

- Proficient with Triple Whale and Google Analytics 4 for performance analysis

- Familiar with Jira and Confluence for task management and documentation, or willing to get up to speed quickly

- Experience with PageFly, Instant, or similar Shopify landing page tools is a clear advantage

- Strong analytical mindset. You make decisions from data, not gut feel

- Excellent written English for reporting and async communication with the Australian team

- Self-directed, hardworking and punctiual. We're not looking for someone who needs daily hand-holding





Work Setup



100% remote, work from home

Full-time, Monday to Friday. 8 hours a day





Compensation



During probation: ?2,500 per day

After successful probation period: ?3,000 per day

Probation review is based on campaign performance, reliability, and communication quality, not an arbitrary timeline

Performance bonuses available for hitting agreed ROAS and revenue targets





How to Apply

Do not send a generic application. We read every submission and generic ones go straight to the bottom.

In your application, please include:



- A brief summary of a Meta campaign you ran for a beauty, cosmetics, or haircare brand. What the objective was, what you tested, and what the results were (actual numbers, not vague descriptions). If you don't have category-specific experience, tell us about your closest equivalent and why it translates.

- Your experience level with Meta Pixel and Conversion API setup

- Any experience with PageFly, Instant, or other Shopify landing page tools, and how you've used them alongside paid traffic

- How you use Triple Whale and/or Google Analytics 4 in your day-to-day workflow

- A screenshot or export from a campaign dashboard you personally managed (blur out any sensitive client info)

Your availability to start



Applications without items 1 and 5 will not be considered.



Why Work With Us

You'll have one brand to focus on, a team that respects your expertise, and a business actively investing in paid growth. If you're good at what you do and want a stable, long-term role where your results are actually visible, this is it.

description:
Job Title: Real Estate Lead Manager

Join Our Dynamic Team!

Are you ready to take your sales career to the next level? We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Real Estate Lead Coordinator to join our innovative team. . Please also mention times and days of the week you're available to work in EST. Applicants must also have a PayPal account, and list their prior real estate experience.

title: Property Management Accountant
description:
Location: Remote



Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with experience in bookkeeping and property management to support daily operations. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, is proactive, and can manage both financial and administrative tasks efficiently.



Key Responsibilities:



Bookkeeping:



* Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers

* Manage accounts payable and receivable

* Reconcile bank statements and transactions

* Prepare basic financial reports (monthly, quarterly)

* Assist with invoicing and expense tracking

* Work with accounting tools (e.g., QuickBooks, Xero)



Property Management Support:



* Coordinate with tenants, landlords, and vendors

* Manage lease agreements and documentation

* Track rent payments and follow up on outstanding balances

* Handle maintenance requests and service scheduling

* Assist with property listings and updates

* Maintain organized records of all property-related activities



Administrative Tasks:



*
 and calendar management

* Data entry and document organization

* Reporting and task tracking

* General virtual support as needed



Requirements:



* Proven experience in bookkeeping and/or property management

* Familiarity with accounting software (QuickBooks, Xero, or similar)

* Strong organizational and multitasking skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

* Reliable internet connection and work setup



Nice to Have:



* Experience with property management software (e.g., AppFolio, Buildium)

title: Credit Repair Customer Service
description:
Credit Repair Customer Service Rep (Remote) — Scale with Credit



We're a fast-growing business funding and credit consulting company looking for a sharp, people-first customer service rep to own the client experience for our credit repair division.



This isn't a passive support role. You'll be the main point of contact for active credit repair clients — keeping them updated, answering questions, and making sure they feel taken care of every step of the way. But beyond that, you'll know when a client is ready to take the next step and be comfortable having that conversation naturally.



What you'll actually be doing:



Managing day-to-day client communication across
, DMs, and any support channels we use. Keeping clients informed on where they are in their credit repair process and what's coming next. Building real relationships — not scripted, not robotic, just genuine. Identifying 
nts where a client is ready to upgrade into our full funding program and making the transition feel like a no-brainer. Asking happy clients for referrals the right way — not pushy, just confident. Flagging issues before they become complaints and keeping churn low.



Who you are:



You're a natural communicator who actually likes talking to people. You can hold a conversation, read the room, and adjust your tone depending on who you're talking to. You're organized enough to juggle multiple clients without things falling through the cracks. You're not afraid to ask for the sale or the referral when the time is right — but you know how to earn it first. You take ownership. If something's wrong, you fix it without being asked.



Requirements:



Previous customer service experience specifically in credit repair or a credit-related field is required. General customer service backgrounds will not be considered. Comfortable with CRM tools and basic admin work. Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace. Availability during core business hours.



Nice to have:



Familiarity with dispute processes, bureau strategy, or credit scoring. Experience in a high-touch service business.



Compensation:



Base pay + performance bonuses tied to upsells and referral conversions. Details discussed on the call.



To apply, send a short voice memo (60–90 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why this role fits you. Applications without a voice memo will not be reviewed. In your message, include the word banana so we know you read this far.

title: Estimator / Engineer with Onsite Experience
description:
Company Overview

We’re a small group of big thinkers working together like a well-oiled machine.

We much rather work with a few exceptional individuals than a lot of average people.

A little bit our company,

We’re based in Sydney NSW

We started in 2022

We specialise in Remedial Construction which is fixing and improving existing buildings that have problems or need updates.

It includes a wide range of activities to keep buildings safe, strong, and looking good.

1. Waterproofing

2. Concrete repairs

3. Masonry repairs

4. Facade restoration

Job Summary

The Estimating Virtual Assistant plays a crucial support role within our pre-construction team, ensuring efficient and organized estimation processes.

This position is instrumental in managing administrative tasks, organizing project documentation, and supporting the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager with detailed preparation for upcoming projects.

The role demands a high level of organization, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Meeting Coordination: Schedule and coordinate virtual meetings, including pre-construction meetings, bid discussions, and project debriefs, ensuring all necessary participants are informed and prepared.

• Deadline Management: Monitor and record project deadlines, providing timely reminders to the team to ensure that submissions and responses are prepared well in advance.

• Job Folder Organization: Set up and maintain digital job folders, ensuring that all project-related documents are accurately filed and easily accessible.

• Document Preparation and Control: Assist in compiling construction markups and preparing bills of quantities, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project requirements.

• Contractor Procurement and Management: Source new contractors, evaluate their qualifications, and maintain an up-to-date contractor list, facilitating effective bid processes and project execution.

• Administrative Support: Provide comprehensive administrative support to the estimating team, including, drafting correspondence, and any other tasks that contribute to the efficiency of the estimating process.

• Follow-Up and Feedback: Organize and manage the collection of feedback from clients and internal tea
mbers post-project completion to identify areas for improvement and celebrate successes.

• Communication: Act as a point of contact for internal and external queries related to estimation projects, ensuring clear and prompt communication.

• Data Management and Analysis: Organize and manage project data, including historical cost data, for easy access and analysis. This can help in making more accurate future estimates.

• Market Research: Conduct online research to stay updated on market trends, material costs, and the availability of subcontractors, which can influence project estimates and bids.

• Monthly Tender Reporting: Support the creation of tender reports related to projects, such as status, total amount of projects tendered, dollar value etc.



Skills and Qualifications

• Skills

o Technical Proficiency: Strong computer skills and proficiency in Plan Swift, MS Office, especially Excel, and familiarity with construction management software.

o Organizational Skills: Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

o Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail, ensuring accuracy in all aspects of work.

o Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

o Proactivity and Initiative: Ability to work independently, take initiative, and proactively address potential issues before they arise.

• Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering, Architecture, or Quantity Surveying

• Experience:

o Experience has a quantity surveyor is preferred.

o Experience in reading and understanding drawings and technical specifications.

Work Environment

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will operate in a dynamic, fast-paced office setting within our pre-construction department.

• Collaboration with the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager are key components of the role.

• The position may require occasional site visits and participation in project meetings.

• This position is fully remote, providing the flexibility to work from home.

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will be part of a supportive virtual team, with regular online meetings and communication channels to stay connected and aligned with the team's goals and projects.

Employment Type, Compensation, and Benefits

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Compensation: TBC on Candidate

• Benefits:

o Professional Development: Opportunities for professional growth including training sessions, workshops, and seminars.

Application Process To apply for the Estimator position, please follow the steps outlined below:

1. Prepare Your Application: Compile your resume, cover letter, and any relevant certifications or portfolios that showcase your experience and skills related to construction estimation.



2. Submit Your Application:
 your application materials to 
 Please include "Estimating VA Application" in the subject line to ensure proper routing.

• Resume / CV

• Qualifications

• Academic Transcript

• Past Projects with Photos – If any

• References

• English Test Results which can be completed here: 
/english-test/

• Typing Test Results which can be completed here: 
/



3. Review Process: Our recruitment team will review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an initial screening interview.



4. Interviews: Selected candidates will be invited to participate in one or more interviews. This may include interviews with the Pre-Construction Manager and other key tea
mbers, potentially including practical assessments or case studies relevant to the role.



5. Decision and Offer: Final candidates will be selected based on their interviews and reference checks. An offer will be extended to the chosen candidate, including a detailed overview of the compensation package and benefits.



6. Onboarding: Upon acceptance, the new Estimator will undergo a comprehensive onboarding process to become acquainted with our team, processes, and projects.



We appreciate your interest in joining our team and look forward to reviewing your application. For any inquiries regarding the application process or the position, please

- Follow up with parents in English and Spanish about intake packets, registration forms, consent forms, missing paperwork, signatures, and appointments

- Comfortable making follow-up calls,
s, and messages

title: Funnel Builder (Funnelish Experience)
description:
We are looking for a full-time Funnel Builder with proven experience in Funnelish. This is a 40-hour-per-week position for someone who is fully dedicated, highly responsive, and ready to execute at a fast pace.



The target output is 2–3 funnels per day. This may sound like a lot, but with our clear SOPs, templates, and proven structures, it is absolutely achievable. Ideally, you will build 1 strong core funnel per day and create 2–3 translated or adapted versions of that funnel for other markets.



You must be comfortable working with structure, following systems, and delivering consistently without sacrificing quality.



Communication is extremely important. If something is delayed, unclear, or not achievable within the deadline, you must communicate immediately. We value transparency, ownership, and reliability. Being fully present during working hours and proactively updating progress is non-negotiable.



We are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes responsibility, and wants to build at scale long-term.
